name: "Bloom", the Continent Corruptor
effect: You must immediately play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Bloom, the Maniacal Botanist" you control when it is defeated by the Poison of a "Paraseed". This condition cannot be negated or substituted. Ascending this Hero does not end your turn. When this Hero Ascends, its current and max HP become 500. Damage this Hero would take from Poison is applied as healing instead. Before a Hero with a "Paraseed"  in its Support Zones takes Poison damage, increase that Poison's damage by 60.

name: "Deadly Poison"
effect: Choose a Poisoned Hero. The Poison heals that Hero instead of dealing damage to it until it is healed. It still counts as a negative status effect.

name: 3-Headed Giant
effect: You may up to 3 times per turn choose a target and deal 80 damage to it.

name: 500 Piranhas in a Monster Suit
effect: Choose a Creature your opponent controls and defeat it to play this card. Place this Creature into the Support Zone the defeated Creature occupied. The corresponding Hero takes 80 damage at the end of each of its controller's turns. Playing this card does not cost an Action, but you can only play 1 "500 Piranhas in a Monster Suit" per turn.

name: ???, the Shapeshifter
effect: You may once per turn equip a Hero with a different name from all Heroes you control from your hand, deck or discard pile to this Hero. This Hero gains the effects and name of the Hero equipped to it this way. At the end of your opponent's turn, send all Heroes equipped this way to the discard pile. Heroes equipped this way count as Equipment Artifacts. This Hero can only be equipped with each Hero once per game.

name: ???, the Throne Robber
effect:
You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "???, the Shapeshifter" you control that has transformed into 3 or more different Heroes this game. 
You may once per turn attach an Ascended Hero with a different name from all Heroes you control from your hand or deck to this Hero. 
If you do, detach all other Ascended Heroes attached this way. This Hero gains the effects and name of the Ascended Hero attached to it this way. 
At the end of your opponent's turn, detach all Ascended Heroes attached this way from it and send them to the discard pile (even if this card has left the board until then).

name: Accidental Dodge
effect: Play this card immediately when a Hero that can use this Attack would be hit by an Attack or Spell with a level lower than or equal to that Hero's Luck level. Negate any effects the Attack or Spell would have on that Hero.

name: Accusation
effect:
Declare a card name. Your opponent must show you their hand and send all cards with the declared name from their hand to the discard pile. 
Draw 1 card for every card your opponent discarded this way.

name: Acid Rain
effect: The first time every turn the turn player plays a Spell from their hand, they must delete 2 cards from their hand OR place a Pollution Token into one of their Heroes' free Support Zones.

name: Acid Vial
effect: Choose a target and deal 150 damage to it. This damage cannot be reduced, redirected or negated. You can only play 1 "Acid Vial" per turn.

name: Adventurousness
effect:
1) You may once per turn use your Action to gain 10 Gold.
2) You may once per turn use your Action to gain 20 Gold.
3) You may once per turn use your Action to gain 30 Gold.

name: Afflicted Pests
effect: Activate this Surprise when your opponent equips or attaches a card to a Hero. Choose a card in any Hero's Support Zone that is not a Creature and send it to the discard pile, then place this Creature into one of the user's free Support Zones. You may once per turn move this Creature you control into the corresponding Hero's Surprise Zone face-down.

name: Afflicted Vermin
effect: Activate this Surprise when either player summons a Creature. Choose a different Creature and defeat it, then place this Creature into one of the user's free Support Zones. You may once per turn move this Creature you control into the corresponding Hero's Surprise Zone face-down.

name: Aggressive Town Guard
effect: If this is the first Creature you summon this turn, summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action. While you control this Creature, you may once per turn choose a target and deal 50 damage to it.

name: Albrecht, the Nerd
effect: When the card you draw during your Resource Phase is a Double Spell, you may reveal it to immediately summon this Creature from your hand as an additional Action. Once per turn, when you draw or add a Double Spell to your Hand, you may reveal it to draw cards equal to its level. You can only control 1 "Albrecht, the Nerd".

name: Alchemic Journal
effect: Draw a card from your Potion Deck. You may pay 5 additional Gold to search your Potion Deck for a card, reveal it and add it to your hand instead. If you do, you cannot play it or cards with the same name for the rest of the turn.

name: Alchemy
effect:
1) You may once per turn pay 8 Gold in order to draw a card from your Potion Deck.
2) You may once per turn pay 4 Gold in order to draw a card from your Potion Deck.
3) You may once per turn draw a card from your Potion Deck.

name: Alex, Trainer of Heroes
effect: You may attach an additional Ability to each of your other Heroes each turn.

name: Alice, the Puppeteer Girl
effect: You may once per turn choose a target your opponent controls and deal 50 damage to it times the number of Creatures you control that were not summoned this turn. This is treated as this Hero hitting the target with a Destruction Magic Spell.

name: Alice, the Transfer Student
effect: Creatures with identical names in the Support Zones of a Hero you control share 1 Support Zone. This effect persists even when this Hero is defeated and cannot be negated.

name: Aligning Goals
effect: Play this card immediately when an opponent's card or effect would take control of a target you control. Negate that card or effect.

name: Alleria, the Queen of Spiders
effect:
When a Surprise in this Hero's Surprise Zone activates, draw 1 card. 
Once per turn, when your opponent chooses exactly 1 target you control for an Attack, Spell or Creature effect, you may redirect that Attack, Spell or effect to any of your 
Heroes that has a Surprise in its Surprise Zone. If you do, that Attack's or Spell's damage cannot be reduced or negated, except by a Surprise.

name: Alliance
effect: Attach this card to the user and choose a Hero your opponent controls. That Hero and the user cannot choose each other as targets of Attacks and Spells, except Support Magic Spells, while there are other possible targets on the board. If all other Heroes you control cannot be chosen or damaged by an Attack or Spell, ignore this effect. At the end of your turn, you may send this card attached to a Hero you control to the discard pile.

name: Alluring Light
effect:
Choose a Hero your opponent controls and a target you control. Your chosen target takes damage equal to the chosen Hero's Attack stat. 
This is treated as the chosen Hero attacking your chosen target.

name: Amazing Finding
effect: Reveal the top card of your deck until you reveal something other than an Artifact. Add all cards revealed by this effect to your hand. You cannot reveal more than 5 cards with this effect.

name: Ambush the Scout
effect:
Play this card immediately when your opponent activates an effect that would interact with your hand. Negate that effect.
Then, your opponent discards 2 cards of their choice from their hand.

name: Analyzer from the Cosmic Depths
effect: Whenever your opponent draws or adds cards to their hand via an effect, place 1 Change Counter onto this Creature. You may once per turn move any number of Change Counters from this Creature to another card on the board. You may once per turn remove up to 6 Change Counters from this Creature to place an Invader Token into one of your opponent's free Support Zones for every 2 Counters removed.

name: Ancient Guardian Statue
effect: When you summon this Creature, choose any level 4 or lower Spell from your deck and openly place it in front of you. It is treated as part of your hand. At the start of each of your turns, if this Creature is still on the board, the Spell's level is reduced by 1. If the Spell's level is reduced to 0 by this effect, you may use it as an additional Action.

name: Ancient Tech Infinite Energy Core
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. The equipped Hero's Attack stat is increased by 10 times the number of cards with different names in your discard pile.

name: Andras, the Human Weapon
effect: When this Hero hits exactly 1 target with a normal Attack whose original level is lower than this Hero's Fighting level, you may choose a second target for the Attack to hit afterwards.

name: Androphobia
effect: This card's level in your hand is reduced by the number of defeated Heroes (yours and your opponent's). Play this card immediately when a Hero takes damage from an Attack or Spell or the effect of a Hero or Ability. Attach this card to the damaged Hero. While this card is attached to a Hero, it cannot target other Heroes with Attacks, Spells or effects. This counts as a negative status effect.

name: Angelfeather Arrow
effect: Play this card when a Hero you control performs an Attack. Increase that Attack's damage by 60.

name: Angler Angel
effect: All damage your other Creatures inflict with their effects is increased by 50.

name: Angry Cheese
effect: Choose a Hero you control and deal 100 damage to it to activate this card. Search your deck for a Destruction Magic Spell, reveal it and add it to your hand.

name: Animal Training
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the user's Attack stat to it. If this Attack would defeat a Creature your opponent controls, fully heal its HP instead and take permanent control of it, but negate its effects for the rest of the turn.

name: Ankhota, the Burier
effect: Delete all Creatures that are moved from the board to anywhere else.

name: Anti Grav Trap
effect:
Activate this Surprise when the HP of any target would be healed. 
That heal is applied as damage instead. Additionally, any healing that target would receive for the rest of the turn is applied as damage.

name: Anti Intruder System
effect:
You must play this card immediately when you draw it, if possible. If you cannot do that, reveal it and shuffle it back into your deck. You cannot activate this card, except through its own effect.
Choose any Creature on the board and delete it, ignoring any effects that would prevent that Creature from being chosen or deleted.

name: Anti Magic
effect: The Hero this Spell is attached to becomes immune to all other Spells up to level 1/2/3 while this card is attached to it, depending on the user's Support Magic level when using this Spell. Detach all Spells up to level 1/2/3 that are already attached to the Hero.

name: Anti Magic Enchantment
effect: Play this card immediately when an Artifact is equipped to a Hero by placing 1 Pollution Token into your free Support Zone. While that Artifact is equipped to a Hero, that Hero's controller may once per turn make the Hero unaffected by a Spell that hits it.

name: Anti Magic Shield
effect: Play this card immediately when a Hero that can use this Spell is hit by an opponent's Spell. If that Spell's level is not higher than the user's Magic Arts level, negate it.

name: Anti Magic Zone
effect: No target can use any Spells and the effects of all Creatures are negated  until the end of your opponent's next turn. This counts as a negative status effect.

name: Anti-Magnet
effect: Play this card immediately when a target you control is chosen by an Attack, Spell or Creature effect while you control other possible targets. The Attack or Spell is redirected to a different target of your opponent's choice.

name: Anti-Magnetic Armor
effect: Once per turn, when the equipped Hero is chosen by an opponent's card or effect, you may make your opponent choose a different target you control instead.

name: Aquanian Orkallion
effect: When you summon this Creature, you may search your deck for an Area and bring it into play, regardless of its level. When this Creature leaves the board, destroy all Areas on the board.

name: Arcane Eyes
effect: While you control this Creature, your opponent cannot place or activate Surprises and must play with their hand revealed.

name: Arcane Lamp
effect: Choose a target your opponent controls and Burn it for the rest of the game.

name: Archer
effect: If you control no Creatures, you may discard 1 "Arrow" Artifact to summon this Creature as an additional Action. Up to 3 times per turn, when you play an "Arrow" Artifact, you may choose a target and deal 40 damage to it.

name: Archer of Teocuilatl
effect: You may sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to summon this Creature as an additional Action. When this Creature is summoned, gain 4 Gold. Whenever a Doom Counter is placed onto a "Doom Clock" during your turn, you may choose a target and deal 50 damage to it.

name: Argos, the Eye of the Cosmos
effect: At the start of your opponent's turn, put as many Change Counters onto this Hero as there are cards in your opponent's hand. At the start of your turn, remove as many Change Counters from this Hero as there are cards in your opponent's hand. You may once per turn remove any number of Change Counters from this Hero to place a "Cosmic Depths" Creature from your hand or deck whose level is equal to the number of counters you removed into this Hero's free Support Zone.

name: Armageddon
effect: Deal 50 damage to all targets, including the user. If all Heroes are defeated after this Spell resolved, the player controlling the most Creatures wins the game. If this results in a draw, you lose the game. You cannot deal any other damage to targets your opponent controls this turn. Immediately end your turn afterwards.

name: Arms Trade
effect: Choose an Artifact equipped to another Hero you control and equip it to the user. You gain Gold equal to the Artifact's Cost. If the user has at least Support Magic 2, this counts as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Arms Trade" per turn.

name: Army of the Cute
effect: Choose "Cute" Creatures from your hand or discard pile whose combined levels do not exceed 1/2/3 and place them into the user's free Support Zones.

name: Arnold, the Maximum Lotl
effect: You may once per turn activate the once per turn effect of a level 1 or lower Creature with this Hero as if it was its own effect.

name: Arrival from the Cosmic Depths
effect: Choose a "Cosmic Depths" Creature from your deck and place it into the free Support Zone of a Hero your opponent controls. Then, choose a "Cosmic Depths" Creature 1 level higher than that and summon it with a Hero you control as an additional Action. This counts as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Arrival from the Cosmic Depths" per turn.

name: Arrow Slit
effect: Play this card immediately when you activate an "Arrow" Artifact. That Artifact activates  a second time immediately after its first activation.

name: Arthor, Inheritor of the Barbarian Sword
effect:
You must play this Hero from your hand on top of an "Arthor, the King of Blackport" you control that is equipped with "Legendary Sword of a Barbarian King" and 
"Summoning Circle". Once per turn, you may deal 400 damage to any target. This is treated as an Attack.

name: Arthor, the King of Blackport
effect: Whenever this Hero casts a Spell while your opponent has more than 1 card in their hand, they must discard 1 card of their choice. If this Hero is equipped with "The White Eye", your opponent must discard 2 cards instead.

name: Ash Worms
effect: When this Creature is deleted from anywhere, you may immediately summon it as an additional Action with any Hero you control and draw 1 card. You can only summon 1 "Ash Worms" per turn.

name: Asriel, the Sapling Sacrificer
effect: You may sacrifice Creatures the turn they are summoned with this Hero's Occultism.

name: Assault Eagle
effect: You may once per turn choose up to 3 different targets on the board and deal 100 damage to them. Then, your opponent may choose up to the same number of targets on the board and deal 50 damage to them.

name: Assault for Teocuilatl
effect: Activate this Surprise when your opponent activates the effect of a Creature while you control more Creatures than them. Negate the effect. Your opponent then has to discard 2 cards or the Creature is defeated.

name: At the Source of the Light
effect: Declare a card name. Your opponent adds all copies of the declared card from their hand to yours. If they add at least 1 card to your hand with this effect, this counts as an additional Action. You cannot interact with your opponent's hand for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Atta, Speaker of Desires
effect: Once per turn, when you reveal exactly 1 Normal Spell from your deck or hand that this Hero can use, except by the effect of an Ability, you may delete that Spell. At the end of your opponent's next turn, if this Hero is not defeated and that Spell is still deleted, this Hero immediately uses it as an additional Action, regardless of its level and in spite of any negative status effects. Spells this Hero uses that would be sent to the discard pile are deleted instead.

name: Attack
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to it.

name: Attack of a God
effect: You can only use this Attack while there's at least 1 Area in play. Send all Areas on the board to the discard pile. Then, choose a target and deal 200 damage times the number of Areas sent to it. This Attack can never hit more than 1 target.

name: Audience with a hostile King
effect: Choose an Ascended Hero your opponent controls and Descend it by sending the Ascended Hero from the top of it to the discard pile. This counts as an additional Action.

name: Aurora Borealis
effect: Choose up to 1/2/3 Spells with different names from your deck, reveal them and add them to your hand. If the user has Magic Arts 3, you may delete 2 of your chosen Spells to immediately perform the third one as an additional Action with the user.

name: Baaliel, the Demon General
effect:
This Hero can summon "Horned Demon" Creatures regardless of their level. Once per turn, summoning a "Horned Demon" with this Hero counts as an additional Action. 
Whenever a target either player controls is defeated, place a Demon Counter on all "Horned Demon" Creatures on the board.

name: Baby Spider
effect: While you control another "Spider" Creature, summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action. You can only summon 1 "Baby Spider" with this effect per turn. You may sacrifice this Creature to immediately activate a Surprise in one of your Heroes' Surprise Zones as if any target had met its activation condition.

name: Backstab
effect: Perform this Attack with a Hero your opponent controls. Choose another target your opponent controls and deal damage equal to the Hero's Attack stat to it.

name: Bad Birthday Girl Cecilia
effect: You may once per turn choose any card on your opponent's side of the board that is not a Hero. Your opponent must declare a number of Gold less than or equal to their current Gold. You may pay your opponent that amount to add the chosen card to your hand OR steal that amount of Gold. Immediately end your turn afterwards. If your opponent has no Gold, you cannot activate this effect.

name: Bakhm, the Desert Digger
effect: This Hero's Support Zones may be used as Surprise Zones, but you can only place Surprise Creatures face-down into them. Whenever a Surprise Creature is activated and summoned, choose a target and deal 80 damage to it.

name: Ballad Harpyformer
effect: If this is the first Creature you summon during your turn, summoning it counts as an additional Action. When you summon this Creature, you may search your deck for a Support Magic Ability, reveal it and add it to your hand. You may once per turn discard a Support Magic Ability from your hand to choose a target you control and heal its HP by 100.

name: Balloons
effect: Play this card immediately when you or 1 or more targets you control or yourself would be affected by an opponent's Surprise or Ability. Choose a target or yourself. That target is unaffected by that Surprise or Ability.

name: Barkeeper
effect: While you control this Creature, all your effects that trigger X times trigger an additional time.

name: Barker, the Monster Tamer
effect: At the start of your first turn, before your Resource Phase, you may choose any level 1 or lower Creature from your hand or deck and place it into one of this Hero's Support Zones.

name: Barrel Home
effect: All Heroes have 1 fewer Support Zone. If a Hero has more cards in its Support Zones than it has Zones after you play this card, its controller must send a card from its Support Zones to the discard pile. Creatures sent that way do not count as being defeated.

name: Barrier of Faith
effect: Play this card immediately when a Hero you control would be affected by a card or effect. Send 3/2/1 Abilities from that Hero to the discard pile to negate any effects that card or effect would have on the Hero, including damage.

name: Barrier of Undying
effect: Play this card immediately when a Creature revived by the effect of Necromancy would take damage. Reduce the damage that Creature would take to 0.

name: Basketskull
effect: Remove any number of Doom Counters from a "Doom Clock" on the board to play this card. Choose a target and deal damage equal to 70 times the number of removed counters to it. This Spell can never hit more than 1 target.

name: Beato, the Butterfly Witch
effect: This hero can use Spells as if it had a copy of every Spell School attached to it.

name: Beato, the Eternal Butterfly
effect:
You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Beato, the Butterfly Witch" you control  that has used at least 1 Destruction, 1 Support, 1 Decay, 1 Summoning 
and 1 Magic Arts Spell this game. This condition cannot be ignored or substituted. This Hero can use any Spell, regardless of its level.

name: Beer
effect: Choose any number of targets you control and heal them from any number of status effects. This Artifact's Cost is multiplied by the number of targets chosen.

name: Begin the Race!
effect: You can only play this card while all Heroes you control are equipped with different "Race Boat" Artifacts. Choose up to 1 lv 0 Creature per Hero equipped from your deck and place them into the free Support Zones of those Heroes, 1 per Hero.

name: Berserk
effect: The Hero this Spell is attached to cannot use any Spells, but it can perform an Attack as an additional Action once per turn. The Hero can never perform more than 2 Attacks per turn. This is treated as a negative status effect.

name: Betrayal
effect:
Choose a level 1/2/3 or lower Creature your opponent controls and take permanent control of it. Place it into one of the user's free Support Zones. 
You must pay your opponent 5 Gold to use this Spell. This counts as an additional Action.

name: Bifab, Bridge of Coolness
effect: This card has no effect when you play it, except from your Coolness Stack. If this is the top card of your Coolness Stack, you may play it from there by deleting it. Search your deck for any card, reveal it and add it to your hand. This counts as an additional Action. You can only play "Bifab, Bridge of Coolness" per turn.

name: Big Gwen Guard
effect: While you control no Creatures, you may discard 1 card from your hand that is revealed because of its own effect to summon this Creature as an additional Action. While you control this Creature, ignore the effects of all cards that are revealed in your hand by their own effects.

name: Bill, the Angry Auctioneer
effect: At the start of the game, before both players draw their starting hands, you may search your deck for up to 2 Artifacts that can be equipped to Heroes and equip them to your other Heroes. A Hero can only be equipped with 1 Artifact by this effect. The Artifacts you choose cannot have a combined Cost above 20.

name: Biomancy
effect:
1) You may once per turn place a Potion you play into a free Support Zone of this Hero as a Biomancy Token with lv 0 and 40 HP instead of deleting it. It may once per turn choose a target and deal 40 damage to it. When it leaves the board, delete it.
2) You may once per turn place a Potion you play into a free Support Zone of this Hero as a Biomancy Token with lv 1 and 60 HP instead of deleting it. It may once per turn choose a target and deal 60 damage to it. When it leaves the board, delete it.
3) You may once per turn place a Potion you play into a free Support Zone of this Hero as a Biomancy Token with lv 2 and 80 HP instead of deleting it. It may once per turn choose a target and deal 80 damage to it. When it leaves the board, delete it.

name: Birthday Present
effect: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Your opponent chooses 1 of them. Add that card to your opponent's hand and add the other 2 cards to your hand.

name: Bishop of Kings [B]
effect: While you control at least 1 "Knight of Kings" and "Board of Kings" is on the board, the effects of all Heroes your opponent controls are negated. This counts as a negative status effect.

name: Bishop of Kings [W]
effect: At the beginning of your turn, you may search your deck for a "Pawn of Kings", reveal it and add it to your hand. If "Board of Kings" is on the board, you may immediately place that Creature into the Support Zone of an undefeated Hero you control. You can only activate this effect of "Bishop of Kings" once per turn.

name: Black Marketeer
effect:
When you play this Creature, you may choose up to 5 cards from your discard pile, shuffle them back into your deck and gain 4 Gold per card. 
You may once per turn choose a card from your discard pile, shuffle it back into your deck and gain 4 Gold. 
You can only summon 1 "Black Marketeer" per game.

name: Blackport Soldier #55
effect: While you control this Creature, Creatures you control are unaffected by your cards and effects (except their own effects).

name: Blackstache, Scourge of the Pixel Seas
effect: You are unaffected by the effect of "Terror" and your opponent cannot end your turn with card effects.

name: Blade of the Frostbringer
effect:
Equip this card to a Hero you control. The equipped Hero's Attack stat is increased by 10. 
Additionally, if the equipped Hero hits exactly 1 target with an Attack, that target is Frozen for 1 turn. 
A target cannot be Frozen in 2 consecutive turns by this effect.

name: Blade of the Swamp Witch
effect:
Equip this card to a Hero you control. The equipped Hero's Attack stat is increased by 10. 
Additionally, any target hit by an Attack of the equipped Hero is Poisoned for the rest of the game. 
If the target is already Poisoned, increase the Poison's damage by 30 instead.

name: Blessing of the Sun
effect: Play this card immediately when 1 or more of your Abilities would be affected by an opponent's card or effect. Negate any effects that card or effect would have on your Abilities. You may discard 1 card from your hand to use this Spell regardless of its level.

name: Blind Destruction
effect: Send all Artifacts equipped to all Heroes on the board, except the user, to the discard pile. Every Hero takes 50 damage times the number of their Artifacts discarded by this effect.

name: Blood Moon under the Sea
effect: When a Creature is placed into the equipped Hero's other Support Zones, its on-summon effects trigger an additional time. You can only activate this effect once per turn.

name: Blood Rock
effect: At the end of each turn, deal 100 damage to all Heroes the turn player controls.

name: Blood-Soaked Coin
effect: Choose a target you permanently control and deal up to 300 damage to it. You gain 1 Gold for every 10 points of damage dealt by this effect. If the target is defeated by this damage, you gain 0 Gold instead. You cannot play other Artifacts for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Bloom, the Maniacal Botanist
effect: Before a Hero with a "Paraseed" Creature  in its Support Zones takes Poison damage, increase that Poison's damage by 30 times the number of "Paraseed" Creatures in its Support Zones.

name: Blow of the Venom Snake
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the user's base Attack stat to it. If the target is not Poisoned, Poison it for the rest of the game. If this is the second Attack you used this turn, that Poison deals 60 damage. If this is the third Attack, it deals 90 damage.

name: Blue-Ice Dragon
effect: You can only summon this Creature by sacrificing 2 Creatures you control that were not summoned this turn. You may summon this Creature as an additional Action. You may once per turn choose a target on the board. If it is Frozen, deal 300 damage to it, otherwise Freeze it for 2 turns. If you did not summon this Creature as an additional Action by its own effect, you may activate this effect the turn this Creature was summoned.

name: Blueprints
effect: Choose an Artifact from your discard pile and add a copy of it from your deck to your hand.

name: Bluff
effect: Activate this Surprise when the user is chosen by an Attack or Spell. Draw 2 cards. When this card is removed from the board by an opponent's card or effect, draw 4 cards.

name: Board of Kings
effect: This Spell's level in your hand is reduced by the number of "of Kings" Creatures you control. You may sacrifice an "of Kings" Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to make playing this card count as an additional Action. Creatures you control can't be chosen and are unaffected by your opponent's cards and effects while there is at least 1 Creature with a lower level in an adjacent Support Zone to them that can be chosen or affected by that card or effect.

name: Boiling Oil
effect: Deal 80 damage to all targets your opponent controls.

name: Bomb Arrow
effect: Play this card when a Hero you control performs an Attack. Increase that Attack's damage by 10. Additionally, you may choose a Creature your opponent controls and deal 100 damage to it.

name: Bomb Berserker Bartas
effect: When this Hero hits exactly 1 target with a normal Destruction Magic Spell whose original level is lower than this Hero's Destruction Magic level, you may choose a second target for the Spell to hit afterwards.

name: Bomb Mite
effect: When you control this Creature at the end of your next turn after summoning it, send it to the discard pile and deal 150 damage to all Heroes your opponent controls. If this Creature is defeated by an opponent's card or effect, deal 100 damage to all Heroes you control.

name: Bomblebee
effect: Once per turn, when a target your opponent controls is defeated, you may choose a target your opponent controls and deal 150 damage to it.

name: Bonded Companion Humby
effect: You can only have 1 copy of this card in your deck. A Hero can only have 1 "Bonded Companion" Creature in its Support Zones. This Creature cannot be moved into a different Support Zone in any way after being summoned. This Creature and the corresponding Hero share 1 HP pool. This Creature is unaffected by cards and effects that can't affect Heroes. When this Creature leaves the board, defeat the corresponding Hero. Once per turn, when you gain Gold through an effect, you may gain 15 additional Gold.

name: Bonded Companion Mellvy
effect: You can only have 1 copy of this card in your deck. A Hero can only have 1 "Bonded Companion" Creature in its Support Zones. This Creature cannot be moved into a different Support Zone in any way after being summoned. This Creature and the corresponding Hero share 1 HP pool. This Creature is unaffected by cards and effects that can't affect Heroes. When this Creature leaves the board, defeat the corresponding Hero. Once per turn, when the corresponding Hero performs an Action, draw a card from your Potion Deck.

name: Bonded Companion Orphy
effect: You can only have 1 copy of this card in your deck. A Hero can only have 1 "Bonded Companion" Creature in its Support Zones. This Creature cannot be moved into a different Support Zone in any way after being summoned. This Creature and the corresponding Hero share 1 HP pool. This Creature is unaffected by cards and effects that can't affect Heroes. When this Creature leaves the board, defeat the corresponding Hero. Once per turn, when you attach an Ability to the corresponding Hero, draw 3 cards.

name: Bonded Companion Thuly
effect: You can only have 1 copy of this card in your deck. A Hero can only have 1 "Bonded Companion" Creature in its Support Zones. This Creature cannot be moved into a different Support Zone in any way after being summoned. This Creature and the corresponding Hero share 1 HP pool. This Creature is unaffected by cards and effects that can't affect Heroes. When this Creature leaves the board, defeat the corresponding Hero. Once per turn, when you sacrifice a target, you may choose a target and deal 150 damage to it.

name: Booby Trap
effect:

name: Future Tech Barrage
effect: Choose a target and deal 180 damage to it. Trigger this effect as many times as there are "Future Tech Barrage" cards in your discard pile. You can only play 1 "Future Tech Barrage" per turn.

name: Future Tech Battery
effect: Choose an Artifact from your hand. For the rest of this turn, that Artifact's Cost is reduced by 10 for every card with the same name as it in your discard pile.

name: Future Tech Bazooka
effect:
Equip this card to a Hero you control. When the equipped Hero defeats a target with an Attack, you may choose up to as many Creatures on the board as there are 
"Future Tech Bazooka" cards in your discard pile and deal 100 damage to them.

name: Future Tech Bomb
effect:
Deal 20 damage to all targets your opponent controls times the number of different "Future Tech" cards cards in your discard pile. 
This damage cannot exceed 100. You can only play 1 "Future Tech Bomb" per turn.

name: Future Tech Control Device
effect: Equip this card to a Hero your opponent controls. Your opponent may once per turn, during their turn, perform the equipped Hero's once per turn effect as if they controlled it. At the end of each of your opponent's turns, they must delete a "Future Tech Control Device" from their discard pile, or this equipped card is sent to the discard pile.

name: Future Tech Copy Device
effect: Choose a "Future Tech" Artifact from your discard pile and shuffle it back into your deck. This Artifact's name, Cost and effect become that Artifact's original name, Cost and effect for the rest of the turn. You can only play 1 "Future Tech Copy Device" per turn.

name: Future Tech Database
effect: Choose as many "Future Tech" cards with different names from your deck as there are "Future Tech Database" cards in your discard pile, except "Future Tech Database", reveal them and add them to your hand.

name: Future Tech Doomsday Bomb
effect: When the equipped Hero would hit 1 or more targets with an Attack, negate that Attack. If you do, all targets on the board take damage equal to 50 times the combined number of "Future Tech Doomsday Bomb" cards in all discard piles. This damage cannot be increased. Send this card to the discard pile afterwards. If all Heroes both players control are defeated after this effect resolves, this card's original owner loses the game. You can only play 1 "Future Tech Doomsday Bomb" per game.

name: Future Tech Doping
effect: Choose a Hero you control and increase its current and max HP by 30 times the number of different "Future Tech" cards in your discard pile.

name: Future Tech Drone
effect: You may once per turn discard up to as many cards as there are "Future Tech Drone" cards in your discard pile and draw the same number of cards.

name: Future Tech Escape Device
effect:
Play this card immediately when a Hero you control would be affected by an Attack or Spell whose level is equal to or lower than the number of "Future Tech Escape 
Device" cards in your discard pile. Negate all effects (including damage) the Attack or Spell has on that Hero.
You can only use 1 "Future Tech Escape Device" on each of your Heroes per turn.

name: Future Tech Fists
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. If that Hero hits exactly 1 target with an Attack, you may choose up to as many other targets as there are "Future Tech Fists" cards in your discard pile. Those targets take damage equal to the attacker's Base Attack stat. You can only activate the effect of "Future Tech Fists" once per turn.

name: Future Tech Gear
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. The first time every turn when your opponent adds a card from their deck to their hand, they must send cards equal to twice the number of "Future Tech Gear" in your discard pile from the top of their deck to the discard pile. You can only have 1 "Future Tech Gear" equipped to your Heroes at any time.

name: Future Tech Gun
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. Increase the equipped Hero's Attack stat by 40 times the number of "Future Tech Gun" cards in your discard pile.

name: Future Tech Gunslinger Riffel
effect: You may once per turn choose an equippable Artifact in your discard pile that this Hero has no copies of equipped to it yet. Search your deck for a copy of that Artifact and equip it to this Hero without paying its Cost.

name: Future Tech Jetpack
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. The equipped Hero cannot be chosen or hit by Attacks whose levels are lower than or equal to the number of "Future Tech Jetpack" cards in your discard pile.

name: Future Tech Lamp
effect:
Look at as many of the top cards of your deck as there are "Future Tech Lamp" cards in your discard pile +1. Add all Artifacts you find among those cards to your hand 
and shuffle the rest of the cards back into your deck.

name: Future Tech Laser Cannon
effect: This card's Cost is decreased by 20 for every copy of "Future Tech Laser Cannon" in your discard pile. Equip this card to a Hero you control. That Hero's Attack stat is increased by 100.

name: Future Tech Magic Modifier
effect: Reveal a Spell in your hand until the end of the turn. That Spell's level is reduced by the number of "Future Tech Magic Modifier" cards in your discard pile while it stays revealed.

name: Future Tech Mech
effect: You may once per turn choose a target and deal 80 damage to it. Repeat this effect as many times as there are "Future Tech Mech" cards in your discard pile.

name: Future Tech Organnon
effect: This Spell can only be used by a Hero with Inventing 3. This must be the only card you play from your hand this turn. Deal 50 damage times the number of "Future Tech Organnon" cards in your discard pile to all targets your opponent controls.

name: Future Tech Potion Launcher
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. You may once per turn look at as many of the top cards of your Potion Deck as there are "Future Tech Potion Launcher" cards in your discard pile, choose 1 of them and play it immediately, if possible. Shuffle the remaining cards back into your Potion Deck.

name: Future Tech Prototypes
effect: While this card is in your discard pile, you may once per turn change its name to that of any other card until the end of this turn.

name: Future Tech Weathercock
effect:
Equip this card to a Hero you control. When the equipped Hero would be affected by an Attack or Spell that also affects at least 1 other target, you may shuffle 1 
"Future Tech Weathercock" from your discard pile back into your deck to negate all effects that Attack or Spell would have on the equipped Hero.

name: Gabby, the Boarding Broad
effect: Up to 5 times per turn, when this Hero takes 30 or more damage, draw 1 card.

name: Gabby, the Pirate Zombie
effect: This cannot be one of your starting Heroes. You may play this card in your main deck if "Gabby, the Boarding Broad" is one of your starting Heroes. When "Gabby, the Boarding Broad" you control would be defeated, you may immediately play this Hero from your hand on top of it to fully heal its HP instead. If you do, delete all cards in its Ability Zones and attach 1 Cannibalism and 1 Necromancy from outside the game to it as additional attachments.

name: Gangster Angel
effect: When you summon this Creature, you may immediately summon an "Angler Angel" from your hand as an additional Action and immediately end your turn afterwards. You may once per turn deal 10 damage to all targets your opponent controls.

name: Garius, the Great Reformer
effect: You may once per turn sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to search your deck for a Creature with the same or a lower level and a different name and place it into the same Support Zone. That Creature may activate its active effect this turn.

name: Gate to the Armory
effect: Choose an Artifact from your deck or discard pile and add it to your hand. If the Artifact can be equipped to a Hero, you may immediately equip it to the user of this Spell without paying its cost. You may make this Spell count as an additional Action, but if you do, immediately end your turn afterwards.

name: Gather Intel
effect: Look at your opponent's hand and choose a card from it. Your opponent must either discard that card or allow you to draw 2 cards (their choice). You may make this count as an additional Action, but if you do, you cannot perform other Actions for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Gatherer from the Cosmic Depths
effect: Whenever your opponent draws or adds cards to their hand via an effect, place 1 Change Counter onto this Creature. You may once per turn move any number of Change Counters from a card you control onto a "Cosmic Depths" Creature you control. You may once per turn remove up to 3 Change Counters from this Creature to draw that many cards.

name: Gathering Storm
effect: Attach this Spell to the Hero that uses it. As long as a Hero you control has this card attached to it, your opponent must choose 3 targets (or as many targets as possible) they control at the start of each of their turns. Deal 70 damage to those targets. This damage is doubled if the corresponding Hero is also equipped with "The White Eye".

name: George, the Mad Tyrant King
effect: You may use this Hero's Diplomacy up to twice per turn. This Hero's Diplomacy has its Cost halved (rounded up), and Creatures affected by this Hero's Diplomacy don't have their effects negated. If your opponent controls no Creatures at the end of their turn, gain 10 Gold.

name: Gerrymander
effect: Whenever a card lets your opponent decide between different effects, you get to choose for them. The first time every turn an effect says your opponent "may" do something, you choose whether or not they do it.

name: Ghazma, the Worm Feeder
effect: Creatures that are defeated are deleted. At the end of every turn, the turn player's deleted Creatures that were not deleted this turn are shuffled back into their owner's deck. Then, the turn player draws that many cards (max 2).

name: Ghostly Warning
effect: Play this card immediately when an opponent's Hero uses a Spell. Negate that Spell and delete it. At the end of your next turn, if that Hero is not defeated and that Spell is still deleted, that Hero immediately performs that Spell as an additional Action, regardless of its level and in spite of any negative status effects.

name: Ghoul Guard
effect: When this Creature is defeated, your opponent must choose a target they control that is not Bleeding and Bleed it for the rest of the game. When this Creature is defeated by an opponent's Attack, Spell or Creature effect, Bleed all their targets instead.

name: Ghuanjun, the Undead Martial Artist
effect: During your Action Phase, this Hero may perform up to 2 Attacks as additional Actions, but if it does, no other Hero you control can perform Actions this turn. This Hero can never perform more than 1 copy of the same Attack per turn. The HP of targets hit by an Attack from this Hero cannot drop below 1 until the end of the turn.

name: Giant Exploding Skull
effect: You may once per turn defeat this Creature. When this Creature is defeated by a Creature's effect or damage inflicted by a Creature's effect, defeat all Creatures on the board.

name: Giga Steroids
effect: You may perform a second Action this turn, but that Action can only be used to activate an effect.

name: Gigalopolis, the Mega-City
effect: This card on the board is unaffected by all other cards and effects and cannot be removed from the board in any way. All Heroes have an additional Support Zone, but that Support Zone can only be occupied by Creatures.

name: Gigantisaur Ankylos
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Gigantisaur" Creature in its Support Zones at a time. You may once per turn discard a card to choose a target your opponent controls and Stun it for 1 turn.

name: Gigantisaur Brachion
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Gigantisaur" Creature in its Support Zones at a time. You can only control 1 "Gigantisaur Brachion" at a time. When the corresponding Hero would take damage, you may discard a card to redirect that damage to this Creature. This Creature cannot be revived by any effects and damage this Creature would take cannot be reduced or negated.

name: Gigantisaur Chimera
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Gigantisaur" Creature in its Support Zones at a time. You can only summon this Creature by sending 3 "Gigantisaur" Creatures with different names from your hand to the discard pile. Summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action, but immediately ends your turn. You may once per turn choose a target and deal damage equal to 100 times the number of different "Gigantisaur" Creatures in your discard pile to it.

name: Gigantisaur King Trex
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Gigantisaur" Creature in its Support Zones at a time. You can only summon this Creature by sacrificing a "Gigantisaur" Creature you control, except "Gigantisaur King Trex". Summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action. While you control this Creature, the levels of all "Gigantisaur" Creatures in your hand are reduced to 0.

name: Gigantisaur Pteranos
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Gigantisaur" Creature in its Support Zones at a time. You may once per turn discard any number of "Gigantisaur" Creatures with different names from your hand (min 1) to draw twice that many cards.

name: Gigantisaur Raptoren
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Gigantisaur" Creature in its Support Zones at a time. When you summon this Creature, you may immediately summon a "Gigantisaur" Creature from your hand as an additional Action. You may once per turn draw cards equal to the number of "Gigantisaur" Creatures you control.

name: Gigantisaur Skull
effect: Choose any Creature on the board and Freeze it for 1 turn. You can only activate this card during your opponent's turn in reaction to an opponent's Creature activating its active effect, and if you do, you must choose that Creature.

name: Gigantisaur Spinor
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Gigantisaur" Creature in its Support Zones at a time. You may once per turn discard your entire hand to choose a target and deal damage equal to 50 times the number of cards discarded to it.

name: Gigantisaur Stegon
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Gigantisaur" Creature in its Support Zones at a time. Once per turn, when a "Gigantisaur" Creature you control takes damage from an Attack, Spell or Creature effect, you may discard 1 card to deal the same damage to the attacker as recoil.

name: Gigantisaur Stomp
effect: This Spell can only be used by a Hero with at least 1 Creature with 400 or more max HP in one of its Support Zones. Choose a Creature with 150 or less max HP and defeat it.

name: Gigantisaur Triceras
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Gigantisaur" Creature in its Support Zones at a time. You may once per turn discard a card to draw 3 cards.

name: Glasowt
effect: You may once per turn choose a target that is immune to any type of damage or cannot be chosen by certain effects and deal 200 damage to it. This damage cannot be reduced or negated and this effect ignores all effects that would prevent the target from being chosen.

name: Glass of Marbles
effect: When this card is discarded or deleted from your hand by an effect, draw 2 cards. You can only activate this effect of "Glass of Marbles" once per turn.

name: Glass Sword
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. The next time that Hero hits exactly 1 target with an Attack, send this equipped card to your discard pile to increase that Attack's damage by 50.

name: Glass Wall
effect: Activate this Surprise when the user is chosen by a level 1 or lower Attack or Spell. Negate that Attack/Spell. You may leave this activated Surprise face-up in the user's Surprise Zone. If the user would be hit by an Attack while this card is in its Surprise Zone face-up, you may send this card to your discard pile to negate any effect the Attack would have on the user.

name: Glimpse of the Future
effect: When you draw this card as part of your starting hand: You may immediately reveal it to draw 2 cards. Those cards count as part of your starting hand.

name: Gloomy Village
effect: While this Area Spell remains on the board, each player must, if they control more than 2 Creatures at the end of their turn, choose Creatures they control and send them to the discard pile until they control 2 Creatures.

name: Glorious Rebirth
effect: You can only play this card when the top card of your Coolness Stack is a level 3 or lower Creature. Place that Creature into a free Support Zone of the user.

name: Gobbo, Chief of Goblin
effect: This Hero can use Attacks regardless of their levels. After performing an Attack, with a higher level than this Hero's Fighting level, reduce this Hero's current and max HP by 100 times the difference.

name: Goff, the Burnbringer
effect: You may once per turn place a "Gon, the Frostbringer" from your hand or deck underneath this Creature. While this Creature has "Gon, the Frostbringer" attached to it, it gains 200 HP and this effect: Any damage your opponent's targets take from Burn is doubled.

name: Gold Trap
effect: Activate this Surprise when your opponent would gain Gold through an effect. You gain that Gold instead.

name: Golden Ankh
effect: Choose a defeated Hero you control and revive it with 100 HP. At the end of this turn, that Hero is defeated again. That effect cannot be negated.

name: Golden Apple
effect: Choose a Hero your opponent controls and take control of it for the rest of the turn. You can't use Attacks or Spells with that Hero and the Hero is unaffected by your other cards and effects while you control it.

name: Golden Arrow
effect: Play this card when a Hero you control hits exactly 1 target with an Attack. You gain 1 Gold for every 10 damage that Attack dealt. You cannot gain or spend Gold for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Golden Bananas
effect: Gain 4 Gold three times.

name: Golden Exploding Skull
effect: When this Creature is defeated, deal 50 damage to all targets you control. You gain 5 Gold for each target hit by this effect.

name: Golden Ladybug
effect: You may immediately summon this Creature from your hand as an additional Action when you activate a Surprise. During each of your Resource Phases, gain 4 additional Gold OR draw 1 additional card.

name: Golden Vermin
effect: Up to 5 times per turn, when you would gain Gold through an effect, you may draw 1 card instead.

name: Golden Wings
effect: Place 1 Pollution Token into your free Support Zone to use this Spell. Choose a Creature you control. That Creature is unaffected by your opponent's cards and effects until the end of this turn.

name: Goldify
effect: Place 1 Pollution Token into your free Support Zone to use this Spell. Choose a Creature and defeat it. Gain Gold equal to 5 times its level. If you chose a level 1 or lower Creature, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Golem Smash
effect: You may delete up to 10 of the top cards of your deck when you play this card. Choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat + 10 times the number of cards you delete with this effect to it. This Attack can never hit more than 1 target at once.

name: Gon, the Frostbringer
effect: All your effects that Freeze one or more targets Freeze them for an additional turn.

name: Gorinthian War Counsellor
effect:
You can only control 1 "Gorinthian War Counsellor".
While you control at least 2 different "War Counsellor" Creatures, you may once per turn choose a target, except this Creature, and Stun it for 2 turns. Any damage targets Stunned by this effect would take becomes 0.

name: Grand Feast
effect: Play this card immediately when one of your Heroes defeats an opponent's Creature with an Attack or Spell. Heal all targets you control for 80 HP.

name: Grand Inquisitor Karian
effect: Any damage this Hero would take from negative status effects is applied as healing instead. While this Hero is Stunned or Frozen, you may perform a second Action with it during your Action Phase and it is otherwise not affected by those effects. Other negative status effects don't affect this Hero.

name: Grasp the Future
effect: When you draw this card as part of your starting hand: You may immediately reveal it and another card in your hand, except "Grasp the Future". Search your deck for a copy of that card, reveal it, and add it to your hand.

name: Grave Worm
effect: When a Creature you control, except "Grave Worm", is defeated and sent to the discard pile while this Creature is in your discard pile, you may summon this Creature into the same Support Zone from your discard pile as an additional Action. You can only summon 1 "Grave Worm" per turn this way. When this Creature is summoned, draw 1 card.

name: Gravedigger
effect: When you summon this Creature, your opponent must send the top 3 cards from their deck to the discard pile OR delete 8 cards from their discard pile (their choice). You may once per turn send the top card of your opponent's deck to the discard pile.

name: Gravedigger Slap
effect: Choose a target and  deal damage equal to 40 times the number of Creatures in your discard pile to a it. This Attack can never hit more than 1 target.

name: Gravedigger's Shovel
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. Everytime the equipped Hero defeats a target your opponent controls, send the top 3 cards from your opponent's deck to the discard pile.

name: Graveyard Gathering
effect: Search your deck for an Ascended Hero, reveal it and add it to your hand. This counts as an additional Action.

name: Graveyard of Limited Power
effect: All damage targets controlled by the player with more cards in their discard pile take from Creature effects is increased by 50.

name: Great Detective Doq
effect: When this Hero attacks, choose a random card from your opponent's hand and declare a card type (Attack/Spell, Artifact, Ability, Hero, Potion). If the card is of the declared type, increase the damage of the Attack by 150 and draw 2 cards.

name: Great Immortal Hydra
effect: Only 1 "Great Immortal Hydra" can be on the board at a time. Up to 3 times per turn, when this Creature would be defeated, it is fully healed instead. Then its level is increased by 1 and its current and max HP by 50. At the end of each of your turns, all Heroes you control lose 50 HP times this Creature's current level.

name: Great Offensive
effect: All Creatures you control immediately use their active effects an additional time (even if they were summoned this turn).

name: Great Vanguard Demon
effect: Reveal this card while it is in your hand. Whenever you play a Reaction Attack or Spell, reduce this card's level in your hand by 1. When you summon this Creature, place a Demon Counter on all Creatures you control. You may once per turn choose a target and deal damage equal to 50 times the combined number of Demon Counters on all cards on the board to it.

name: Greatmaw Remora
effect: If you control at least 1 "Greatmaw" Creature, except "Greatmaw Remora", you may summon this Creature from your hand as an additional Action, but if you do, you cannot summon Creatures for the rest of the turn afterwards, except "Greatmaw" Creatures. This Creature can be sacrificed the turn it was summoned for the effects of a "Greatmaw" Creature. When this Creature is sacrificed, delete it.

name: Greatmaw Shark
effect: You may once per turn sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to increase the Attack stat of a Hero you control by 100 until the end of the turn. You can only use this effect of "Greatmaw Shark§" once per turn.

name: Greatmaw Siren
effect: You may sacrifice Creatures you control the turn they are summoned for the effects of "Greatmaw" Creatures. Creatures sacrificed this way, except "Greatmaw" Creatures, have their effects negated.

name: Grinning Cat
effect: When you draw or add this card to your hand, you must immediately reveal it. While this card is in your hand, you cannot summon any Creatures except "Grinning Cat".

name: Grisgar, Emissary of the Demon Lord
effect: When this Hero hits exactly 1 target with a normal Decay Magic Spell whose level is lower than this Hero's Decay Magic level, you may choose a second target for the Spell to hit afterwards.

name: Grunge Harpyformer
effect: If this is the first Creature you summon during your turn, summoning it counts as an additional Action. When you summon this Creature, you may search your deck for a Destruction Magic Ability, reveal it and add it to your hand. You may once per turn discard a Destruction Magic Ability from your hand to choose a target and Burn it for the rest of the game.

name: Guard Change
effect: Choose any number of Creatures you control (min. 1) and place them into free Support Zones of other Heroes you control. You can also swap Creatures between Heroes you control. If the user has at least Support Magic 2, this counts as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Guard Change" per turn.

name: Guard Duty
effect: Shuffle your entire discard pile back into your deck. Your opponent may then shuffle their entire discard pile back into their deck. This counts as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Guard Duty" per game.

name: Guardian Angel
effect: If the Hero this card is attached to would be defeated, fully heal its HP instead and delete this card. You can only play 1 "Guardian Angel" per game.

name: Guardian Beast Gou
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete total cards from both discard piles up to the number of targets you control other than this one to choose the same number of targets on the board, except "Guardian Beast Gou" Creatures. Those targets take no damage until the beginning of your next turn. If this Creature leaves the board, this effect ends prematurely.

name: Guardian Beast Hou
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete total cards from both discard piles up to the number of targets on the board to choose the same number of targets on the board and deal 50 damage to them.

name: Guardian Beast Hu
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete 5 cards total from both discard piles to immediately perform an additional Action with any Hero you control.

name: Guardian Beast Ji
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete 3 cards total from both discard piles to choose any target on the board and Stun it for 1 turn.

name: Guardian Beast Long
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete up to 3 cards total from both discard piles to choose the same number of targets on the board and Burn them for the rest of the game. After this effect resolved, not more than 3 targets can be Burned.

name: Guardian Beast Ma
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn send up to the top 3 cards from both decks to the discard pile.

name: Guardian Beast Niu
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete up to 5 cards total from both discard piles to increase the damage the next Attack one of your Heroes performs this turn by 50 for each card deleted this way.

name: Guardian Beast She
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete up to 3 cards total from both discard piles to choose the same number of targets on the board and Poison them for the rest of the game. If you choose targets that are already Poisoned, increase their Poison's damage by 30 instead.

name: Guardian Beast Shu
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete a multiple of 4 cards total from both discard piles to choose a Creature on your side of the board. Choose as many copies of that Creature from your deck and/or discard pile as you have deleted multiples of 4 cards and add them to your hand.

name: Guardian Beast Tu
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete 3, 6 or 9 cards total from both discard piles to draw a card for every 3 cards deleted this way.

name: Guardian Beast Yang
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn choose up to 3 of your opponent's deleted cards and add them to their discard pile. If you return 3 cards this way, draw 2 cards from your deck.

name: Guardian Beast Zhu
effect: You can only summon this Creature while you have no cards in your discard pile. If you have not summoned a "Guardian Beast" Creature yet this turn, summoning this counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete 8 cards each from each discard pile, including at least 3 "Guardian Beast" Creatures total with different names, to skip your opponent's next turn. You can never activate this effect the turn you summon this Creature. You can only activate this effect once per game.

name: Guardian of Teocuilatl
effect: You may sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to summon this Creature as an additional Action. When an Area would be affected by a card or effect, you may sacrifice this Creature from your hand or side of the board to negate all effects that card or effect would have on that Area.

name: Guardian's Appearance
effect: Choose a "Guardian Beast" Creature from your hand and place it into the free Support Zone of any Hero you control, ignoring its summoning restrictions. If you do, send the top 3 cards of either player's deck to their discard pile.

name: Güldefaber, the King of Dwarfs
effect: You may spend your Action to gain 20 Gold. Once per turn, when this Hero performs an Attack or Spell, gain 10 Gold.

name: Hammer Horse
effect: Up to 3 times per turn, when you would discard exactly 1 card, you may shuffle that card back into your deck instead and then draw 1 card.

name: Hammer Skeleton
effect: You may once per turn choose a Spell attached to a Hero or an Area in play and send it to the discard pile.

name: Hammer Throw
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to it. The target's controller must delete a card from their hand whenever they play an Artifact during their next turn.

name: Hand of Death
effect: If the user is not defeated, Frozen or Stunned at the end of your opponent's next turn, you may choose any target and defeat it. This effect can never affect more than 1 target. If a target is defeated by this effect, skip your next turn. You can only play 1 "Hand of Death" per turn.

name: Hardy Slime
effect: When you summon this Creature, your opponent has to choose it with all Attacks and Spells they use until your next turn, if possible. You can only activate this effect once per turn. At the beginning of each of your turns, you may increase this Creature's level on your side of the board by 1.

name: Haressassin
effect: You may once per turn choose a target and deal 150 damage to it.

name: Harpthenean War Counsellor
effect:
You can only control 1 "Harpthenean War Counsellor".
You may once per turn gain 10 Gold times the number of "War Counsellor" Creatures you control OR choose a target and deal damage equal to 5 times your current Gold to it. That damage cannot exceed 300.

name: Harpyformer Choir

You may once per turn choose a level 3 or lower Creature from your discard pile and place it into a free Support Zone of any of your Heroes.

name: Leadership
effect:

3) You may once per turn shuffle up to 5 cards from your hand into your deck and draw the same number of cards +1.

effect: You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Lolek, the Shard Knight" you control that is equipped with "Shattered Trident, Treasure of the Deepsea" and "Diver Helmet". name: Lolek, the Shard Knight
effect: You may once per turn send an equippable Artifact from your deck or hand to your discard pile to draw 1 card OR choose an equippable Artifact from your discard pile and equip it to a Hero you control by paying half its Cost.

effect: You may once per turn search your deck for a card and place it on top of your Coolness Stack, but if you do, Stun a target you control for 1 turn.

name: Loot the Leftovers
effect: Play this card immediately when a player defeats a Hero their opponent controls. Choose 2 random cards from your opponent's hand and add them to your hand.

name: Loot the Princess
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to it. You may then choose any Artifact equipped or Spell attached to an opponent's Hero and equip/attach it to the user.

name: Looting
effect: Play this card immediately when a target your opponent controls is defeated. Choose a random card from your opponent's hand and add it to your hand.

name: Lord Mithuru, the Rotten Mastermind
effect: Each other Hero you control may once per turn perform a Double Spell as if it had an additional copy of both required Spell Schools attached to it.

name: Love Shot

Draw a card. Then, choose a Hero your opponent controls and perform a Spell or Attack from your hand with it, if possible, as if you control it. 
For that Spell or Attack only, the Hero is treated as controlled by you. 
The controlled Hero cannot take any damage while it is controlled by this effect.

name: Lovely Teddy
effect: You may once per turn choose a Creature your opponent controls. You may use that Creature's active effects as if you control it for the rest of the turn.

name: Loving Puppet Pavi
effect: This does not count as a Creature, but can still be chosen like one. Cannot be moved to a different Support Zone. You may once per turn summon a Creature from your hand as an additional Action, but if you do, its current and max HP become 1. If the corresponding Hero's name is "Tri Fecta, the Puppet Master", immediately replace this Token with a "Destructive Puppet Shishi" Token.

name: Loyal Beagle
effect: You may once per turn gain 6 Gold times the number of "Loyal" Creatures you control.

name: Loyal Bone Dog
effect:
When a "Loyal" or "Skeleton" Creature you control would be defeated, you may discard this card from your hand to heal that Creature's HP completely instead. 
This Creature is also treated as a "Skeleton" Creature.

name: Loyal Hountriever
effect: Up to 3 times per turn, when you summon a "Loyal" Creature, except "Loyal Hountriever", draw 1 card.

name: Loyal Labradoodle
effect: All damage your Creatures receive is reduced by 20 times the number of "Loyal" Creatures you control. This effect does not stack with itself.

name: Loyal Pinpom
effect: When you summon this Creature, you may immediately summon another "Loyal" Creature from your hand as an additional Action. You can only activate this effect of "Loyal Pinpom" once per turn.

name: Loyal Rottweiler
effect: You may once per turn sacrifice this Creature to place a "Loyal" Creature from your deck into the same Support Zone it occupied.

name: Loyal Shepherd

Negate that Creature's effects until the beginning of your next turn.

name: Loyal Terrier
effect: You may once per turn deal 50 damage to any target you control. If you do, until the beginning of your next turn: Whenever 1 or more "Loyal" Creatures you control are defeated (including through that damage), you may deal 50 damage to a target your opponent controls.

name: Luck
effect:
1) You may once per turn declare a card name. Whenever your opponent plays a card of that name until the beginning of your next turn, draw 2 cards.
2) You may once per turn declare a card name. Whenever your opponent plays a card of that name until the beginning of your next turn, draw 3 cards.
3) You may once per turn declare a card name. Whenever your opponent plays a card of that name until the beginning of your next turn, draw 4 cards.

name: Lucky Puppet Laki
effect: This does not count as a Creature, but can still be chosen like one. Cannot be moved to a different Support Zone. You may once per turn place a Luck Counter on all targets you control. When a target with a Luck Counter on it is chosen by an opponent's card or effect, you may remove all Luck Counters from all targets you control to redirect that card or effect to another target you control of your choice. No other Token in the corresponding Hero's Support Zones can use its active effect for the rest of the turn afterwards. If the corresponding Hero's name is "Tri Fecta, the Puppet Master", immediately replace this Token with a "Preserving Puppet Vinny" Token.

name: Luna Kiai

name: Luna Pele, the Flame Dancer

Negate your opponent's card and delete it. If the card was your opponent's Action, they may immediately perform a different Action instead.

name: Lunatic Cycle - Crescent Moon

name: Lunatic Cycle - Full Moon

name: Lunatic Cycle - Gibbous Moon

name: Lunatic Cycle - Half Moon

name: Lunatic Cycle - New Moon

* 5: Any target chosen by this Creature is immediately defeated.

* 4+: You may once per turn summon a "Lunatic" Creature from your hand as an additional Action.
* 5: Your Heroes' Attack stats are doubled and damage they deal with Attacks cannot be reduced or negated.

name: Meteor Crash

name: Mimic

If you control more than 2 Heroes, immediately send this card to the discard pile.

name: Mine! Mine! Mine!

Choose an Artifact equipped to a Hero your opponent controls and add it to your hand. You may immediately play it before ending your turn.
If the user has at least Charme 1, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Minocrete War Counsellor
effect:
You can only control 1 "Minocrete War Counsellor".
Any damage your other "War Counsellor" Creatures deal is doubled. You may once per turn choose a target and deal damage to it equal to the amount of damage it already took this turn.

name: Mirjam, the Fallen Cute Angel

name: Mischief Militia - Banner Bearer

name: Mischief Militia - Bear Rider

name: Mischief Militia - Chilly Dog

name: Mischief Militia - Chilly Wizard
effect: Summon this card into the Support Zone of any Hero either player controls. Summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action. Any negative status effect this Creature is affected by also affects the corresponding Hero while this Creature remains on the board. This effect cannot be negated.

name: Mischief Militia - Heli Troopers

name: Mischief Militia - Thaw Blader
effect: You may once per turn choose a Frozen target and deal 200 damage to it. If you do, heal it from its Freeze. You may activate this effect the turn this Creature was summoned.

name: Misfire
effect: Play this card immediately when a player plays an Artifact. Negate that Artifact. That player may then add a copy of that Artifact from their deck to their hand. The next time they play an Artifact with that name this turn, its Cost becomes 0.

name: Missing People

name: Mission of the Light Brigade

name: Modnir, Hammer of Coolness

name: MOE Bomb
effect: Deal 999 damage to all Creatures both players control.

name: MOE Shield

Play this card immediately when your opponent activates a Spell that would affect 1 or more targets you control. Negate that Spell.
