name: Molinda, the Cutest Being in the Sky
effect: You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Cute Angel Molinda" you control that is equipped with "Heart-Shaped Bow, the Final Proof of Cuteness". You may once per turn choose a target your opponent controls and take control of it for the rest of the turn.

name: Monia Bot, the Foretold Rescuer of Coolness
effect: You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Cool Rescuer Monia" you control that is equipped with "Cool Tech Jetpack". Once per turn, when any other target you control would take damage, you may redirect that damage and all other effects associated with it to this Hero. If you do, halve that damage.

name: Monsieur Pete, the Booty Raider
effect: Whenever this Hero takes damage from an opponent's card or effect or from a negative status effect inflicted by your opponent, you may search your deck for any card, reveal it, and add it to your hand.

name: Monster in a Bottle
effect: Choose a level 3 or lower Creature from your hand or discard pile and immediately summon it as an additional Action.

name: Monster Nest
effect: You may once per turn choose a level 3 or lower Creature from your deck and place it on top of this card. This counts as that Creature being summoned. When you do, the new Creature replaces this one until the end of the turn. At the end of your turn, remove any Creature placed on top of this one and delete it. This doesn't count as the Creature being defeated.

name: Moonlight Butterfly
effect: At the end of your opponent's turn, you may add this Creature you control back to your hand, and if you do, deal 150 damage to the opponent's Hero in the same position as the corresponding Hero.

name: Motharch Squire
effect: When you play this Creature, choose up to 2 Artifacts with different names from your discard pile and shuffle them back into your deck. When this Creature is defeated, you may search your deck for an Artifact, reveal it and add it to your hand. You can only activate this effect of "Motharch Squire" once per turn.

name: Mountain Boars
effect: You may delete an Area Spell on the board that was not played this turn to summon this Creature from your hand or discard pile as an additional Action.

name: Mountain Tear River
effect: Activate this Surprise when the user or a Creature in one of its Surprise Zones is chosen by an Attack, Spell or Creature effect. Burn the attacker for the rest of the game. If the user has Destruction Magic 3, Burn up to 2 additional targets for the rest of the game as well.

name: Mr. Jiggles
effect: You may once per turn choose up to 2 targets your opponent controls and inflict 100 damage to them.

name: Mummy Maker Machine
effect: Activate this Surprise when your opponent activates a Hero's active effect. Place a Mummy Token into the free Support Zone of a Hero that does not have a Mummy Token in its Support Zones yet, then place this Creature into one of the user's free Support Zones. You may once per turn move this Creature you control into the corresponding Hero's Surprise Zone face-down.

name: Mummy Token
effect:
The effect of the corresponding Hero is replaced by this effect:
You may once per turn place a Mummy Token into the free Support Zone of a Hero your opponent controls that has no Mummy Tokens in its Support Zones yet.

name: Muscle Training
effect: Search your deck for a copy of Fighting and attach it to the user as an additional attachment. If the user has an Artifact equipped to it and this is the first Attack it uses this turn, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Mysterious Core
effect: Choose up to 3 Artifacts with different names from your deck and send them to your discard pile.

name: Mystery Box
effect: This card has no effect when you play it. The first time every turn a "Mystery Box" is sent to the discard pile or deleted from your deck, draw 2 cards.

name: Nao, the Barrier Priestess
effect:
When this Hero heals a target's HP while they are lower than or equal to their maximum, it can heal that target's HP beyond their maximum. 
The max HP of the target stays unchanged.

name: Nasty Prank
effect: Play this card immediately when an opponent's Hero performs an Attack or Spell. That Hero cannot perform another Attack/Spell with that name until the end of your opponent's next turn. If the user has at least Magic Arts 1, that Hero cannot perform another Attack/Spell with that name for the rest of the game instead. This counts as a negative status effect.

name: Navigation
effect:
1) You may once per turn discard 3 copies of the same card from your hand to search your deck for a card, reveal it and add it to your hand. You cannot draw or add cards to your hand for the rest of the turn afterwards.
2) You may once per turn discard 2 copies of the same card from your hand to search your deck for a card, reveal it and add it to your hand. You cannot draw or add cards to your hand for the rest of the turn afterwards.
3) You may once per turn discard 2 copies of the same card from your hand to search your deck for a card, reveal it and add it to your hand.

name: Necromancy
effect:
1) You may once per turn choose a level 1 or lower Creature from your discard pile and summon it with this Hero as an additional Action, but negate all its effects until the 
beginning of your next turn.
2) You may once per turn choose a level 2 or lower Creature from your discard pile and summon it with this Hero as an additional Action, but negate all its effects until the 
beginning of your next turn.
3) You may once per turn choose a level 3 or lower Creature from your discard pile and summon it with this Hero as an additional Action, but negate all its effects until the 
beginning of your next turn.

name: Nerdy Cheese
effect: Search your deck for a Magic Arts Spell and delete it. Then, add a Spell with the same name from your deck to your hand.

name: Nero Zira, the Mastermind
effect: Up to 5 times per turn, when a Creature is placed into one of your Heroes' Support Zones, permanently increase this Hero's Attack by 30.

name: Nicolas, the Hidden Alchemist
effect: When you play this Hero, your deck may contain Potion cards. The combined number of Potions in your deck and Potion Deck cannot exceed 15 and the number of copies of any given Potion between your deck and Potion Deck cannot exceed 2. After you played your second Potion during a turn, you cannot play Potions for the rest of that turn (even if this Hero gets defeated until then).

name: Nieht, the Blitz Blade
effect: Whenever this Hero hits exactly 1 target your opponent controls with an Attack, draw 1 card. Once per turn, when this Hero hits exactly 1 target with an Attack and doesn't defeat it, you may immediately use a level 1 or lower Attack from your hand with it as an additional Action against the same target.

name: Night Mare
effect: At the beginning of each turn, the turn player must choose a target they control (except this Creature) and deal 150 damage to it.

name: Night, the Herald of Chess
effect: At the beginning of your first turn, you may delete your other 2 Heroes and all cards in their Ability Zones. If you do, this Hero gains the effects of both deleted Heroes and its current and max HP are increased by their combined max HP. You may then change this Hero's name to that of one of the deleted Heroes. When this Hero Ascends, it keeps all effects gained this way and its current and max HP do not change.

name: Nimble Monkee
effect: When you gain 4 or more Gold through an effect, you may immediately summon this Creature from your hand as an additional Action by paying that Gold. You can only summon 1 "Nimble Monkee" per turn.

name: No Retreat!
effect: Play this card immediately when your opponent activates a card or effect that would include shuffling cards from their hand, discard pile or side of the board back into the deck. Negate that card or effect.

name: Noble Mummy Guards
effect: Activate this Surprise when your opponent attaches an Ability to a Hero. Choose a different Ability attached to the same Hero and return it to its original owner's hand, then place this Creature into one of the user's free Support Zones. You may once per turn move this Creature you control into the corresponding Hero's Surprise Zone face-down.

name: Nomu, Wanderer of Worlds
effect: Up to 4 times per turn, when you would draw exactly 1 card through an effect, you may draw 3 cards instead.

name: Null Zone
effect: Place 2 Pollution Tokens into your free Support Zones to use this Spell. Until the end of your next turn, negate the effects of all Creatures and Heroes cannot use any Spells. This counts as a status effect. This counts as an additional Action.

name: Occultism
effect:
1) You may once per turn sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to  choose a target and deal 50 damage to it.
2) You may once per turn sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to  choose a target and deal 100 damage to it.
3) You may once per turn sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to  choose a target and deal 150 damage to it.

name: Off Duty
effect: Play this card immediately when your opponent summons a Creature. Negate the summoning and shuffle the Creature back into the deck. If the Creature was their Action, your opponent may immediately perform a different Action afterwards.

name: Off with His Head!
effect: This must be the only Action you perform this turn. You can only play this card while your opponent controls more undefeated Heroes than you. Choose a Hero your opponent controls and defeat it. This Attack can never hit more than 1 target. Immediately end your turn afterwards. You can only play 1 "Off with His Head!" per game.

name: Old Couple
effect: Play this card immediately when you summon a Creature with level 1/2/3 or lower. Search your deck for a Creature with the same level and a different name and immediately summon it as an additional Action with the same Hero. You cannot summon Creatures for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Omikron, the Faceless Illusionist
effect: Whenever this Hero hits exactly 1 target with a Spell, you may choose one of that target's Abilities and place it on top of any of your Heroes' Abilities as an additional attachment, leveling it up. Abilities attached this way cannot be removed from the board in any way and are returned to your opponent's Heroes at the end of the turn.

name: Open Invitation
effect: You can only play this card during your first Power-Up Phase. Choose an Ascended Hero from your hand and place it on top of an appropriate Hero you control, ignoring its Ascension Conditions, ending your turn. This does not count as that Hero Ascending. At the end of your next turn, shuffle the Ascended Hero back to your deck.

name: Orthos, the Loyal Guard Dog
effect: Once per turn, if this Hero summons a "Loyal" Creature, you may immediately have it summon a second "Loyal" Creature from your hand as an additional Action.

name: Outbreak
effect: This Spell can only be used by a Hero that is afflicted by at least 1 negative status effect. This Spell can be used in spite of any negative status effects. Choose a target and deal 100 damage to it. Then, heal the user from all negative status effects. If this damage defeats a target, you may immediately perform an additional Action with the user.

name: Overcharge
effect: Choose an Artifact equipped to a Hero you control and send it to the discard pile. Then, choose an equippable Artifact with a Cost between 1 and 10 Gold higher than the discarded one from your deck and equip it to the same Hero. If the user has at least Magic Arts 2, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Overflowing Chalice
effect: Your opponent chooses a Hero you control. That Hero may immediately perform an additional Action. You cannot perform Actions for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Overheal Shock
effect:
Attach this card to a Hero your opponent controls. Any healing that Hero would receive is applied as damage instead. 
If the user has at least Decay Magic 1 or Support Magic 2, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Overheat
effect: Choose an Artifact that is equipped to a Hero and send it to the discard pile. If the user has at least Decay Magic 2, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Pangaia, the Dino Domain
effect: The current and max HP of all level 3 or higher Creatures either player summons are increased by 200.

name: Paraseed
effect: When this Creature is defeated by a Hero or Creature, place it into one of the attacking or corresponding Hero's free Support Zones instead of sending it to the discard pile. While this Creature is in a Hero's Support Zone, that Hero is Poisoned. Damage that Hero takes from Poison reduces its current and max HP. That Hero's Poison cannot be healed, but it is removed when this Creature leaves the Hero's Support Zone.

name: Paraseed Control
effect: Play this card immediately when a Hero your opponent controls is defeated by Poison while it has a "Paraseed" in its Support Zone. Revive that Hero. Its current and max HP become 100 and cannot be increased in any way. You take permanent control of that Hero.

name: Paraseed Greenhouse
effect: You may once per turn discard a card from your hand to search your deck for a "Paraseed" and place it into the free Support Zone of any Hero you control that does not have a "Paraseed" in its Support Zones yet OR move any number of "Paraseeds" anywhere on the board to the free Support Zones of any other Heroes on the board.

name: Paraseed Zombie
effect: Play this card immediately when a Hero you control would be defeated by an opponent's card or effect. Place a "Paraseed" from your hand or deck into that Hero's free Support Zone, and if you do, that Hero's HP drop to 1 instead. Delete this card.

name: Party Crasher
effect: Play this card immediately when your opponent chooses one of their own Heroes with a card or effect. Negate that card or effect and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to your opponent's chosen Hero instead. If the negated card was your opponent's Action, they may immediately perform an additional Action.

name: Patty, the Ninja of Revenge
effect: You may once per turn send any number of Abilities that are attached to a Hero you permanently control to the discard pile, and if you do, choose a target and deal 50 damage times that number to it. This damage cannot exceed 200 and is treated as an Attack.

name: Pawn Chain
effect: Play this card immediately when a Creature you control is defeated. Choose a "Pawn of Kings" from your hand or deck and place it into the same Support Zone as the defeated Creature as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Pawn Chain" per turn.

name: Pawn of Kings [B]
effect: Your deck may contain up to 8 copies of this card. While "Board of Kings" is on the board, Areas cannot be removed from the board by cards or effects of the opponent of the player who played them.

name: Pawn of Kings [W]
effect: Your deck may contain up to 8 copies of this card. If "Board of Kings" is on the board and you have not summoned any Creature yet this turn, summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action.

name: Pawn Sacrifice
effect: Sacrifice a "Pawn of Kings" to draw 3 cards OR delete a "Pawn of Kings" from your discard pile to draw 2 cards. If you control at least 1 "of Kings" Creature after this Spell resolves, this counts as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Pawn Sacrifice" per turn.

name: Perfect Disguise
effect: Choose a target you control. That target cannot be chosen by your opponent during their next turn, except if it is your last undefeated Hero. You can only play 1 "Perfect Disguise" per game.

name: Performance
effect:
Place this card on top on any level 1 or 2 Ability of a Hero you control. This card becomes a copy of that Ability, increasing it to the next level. Deal 50 damage to the Hero you attach this Ability to.
Your deck cannot contain more than 4 copies of "Performance".

name: Perilous Journey
effect: Search your deck for an Ascended Hero, reveal it and add it to your hand. During your next turn, you may Ascend an appropriate Hero to that Ascended Hero, ignoring its Ascension condition, but if you do, Burn all targets you control for the rest of the game. That Burn cannot be healed.

name: Pes'zet, the Plague Bringer
effect: Whenever a player summons a Creature, you may choose any target on the board and Poison it. If the target is already Poisoned, increase its Poison's damage by 30 instead.

name: Pet Snake
effect: You may heal a Poisoned Hero from its Poison to summon this Creature as an additional Action. You can only summon 1 "Pet Snake" per turn this way. You may once per turn choose a Poisoned target and increase its Poison's damage by 30.

name: Peter Röll, the Protagonist
effect:
You may play any number of copies of this Hero as part of your Starting Heroes.
Whenever a target you control is defeated, you may attach an Ability from your hand or deck to this Hero as an additional attachment.

name: Petrification Break
effect: This Spell can only be used by a Stunned Hero. Heal the user from its Stun and attach this card to it. While this card is attached to a Hero, it cannot be affected by negative status effects and any damage it would take is halved (rounded up).

name: Petrifier
effect: Choose a target and Stun it for 3 turns. Damage a target Stunned by this effect would take becomes 0.

name: Petrifying Potion
effect: Choose a Hero you control and Stun it for 3 turns. Damage a Hero Stunned by this effect would take becomes 0. You may heal a Hero Stunned by this effect from its Stun at any time during your turn.

name: Phalanx Pike

name: Pharaoh, the Lone Living Being

At the end of your turn, if there is at least 1 Divinity Counter on this Hero, sacrifice a target you control, then remove 1 Divinity Counter from this Hero. This effect cannot be negated.

name: Phatnir, Prototype of Coolness

name: Philosopher's Stone
effect: Play this card immediately when you would draw a card from your Potion Deck. Search your Potion Deck for a card, reveal it and add it to your hand instead.

name: Phoenix Bombardment

name: Phoenix Tackle

name: Piercer of Heavens
effect: Choose a target and deal 250 damage to it. This damage cannot be reduced or negated, and this Spell can always choose any target, ignoring any other effects.

name: Piggyfication

Attach this card to any Hero with 2 free Support Zones and place the "Piggyfied Hero" into one of its other free Support Zones. When either this or "Piggyfied Hero" leaves the Hero's Support Zone, remove the other card as well.

name: Piggyfied Hero
effect: This Creature can only be summoned by the effect of "Piggyfication". The corresponding Hero cannot perform Actions and its effects and Abilities are negated. This does not count as a status effect. When this Creature is removed from the board by its controller's card or effect, deal 150 damage to the corresponding Hero.

name: Pillage
effect:
1) You may once per turn send the top card of your opponent's deck to the discard pile.
2) You may once per turn send the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck to the discard pile.
3) You may once per turn send the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck to the discard pile.

name: Pillar of Light
effect: Declare a card name. Your opponent must search their deck for a card with that name and add it to their hand, if possible. If they find a card with the declared name, this counts as an additional Action and you may draw a card. You can only play 1 "Pillar of Light" per turn.

name: Pinaxolotl
effect: When this Creature is defeated, you may search your deck for any Creature, reveal it and add it to your hand. If it's a level 0 Creature, you may immediately summon it as an additional Action.

name: Pink Sky
effect:
Negate the effects of all Creatures both players currently control until the end of your opponent's next turn, except "Cute" Creatures. 
This counts as a negative status effect.

name: Pinta, the Singing Ship
effect: Creatures in this Hero's Support Zones are treated as Artifacts equipped to this Hero and not as Creatures. They are only affected by cards and effects that affect equipped Artifacts.

name: Planet in a Bottle
effect: Choose a level 3 or lower Area from your deck, hand or discard pile and bring it directly into play.

name: Plant Golem
effect: Summon this card into a free Support Zone of a Hero your opponent controls. The corresponding Hero cannot perform Actions. You may spend your Action and discard a card to defeat this Creature you control.

name: Play Money
effect: Choose another Artifact from your hand. That Artifact's Cost is reduced by 20 for the rest of the turn.

name: Pocket Catapult
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. When the equipped Hero uses an Attack, you may choose a Creature your opponent controls and deal 80 damage to it.

name: Point-Blank Annihilation
effect: Play this card immediately when the user is defeated by an opponent's Creature effect. Defeat all Creatures your opponent controls.

name: Poison Pollen
effect: Stun all Poisoned targets on the board for 1 turn and Poison all Stunned targets on the board until the end of the game. Targets that are already Poisoned and Stunned have their Poison's effect increased by 30 instead.

name: Poison Vial
effect:
Choose a target and Poison it for the rest of the game. This Poison deals 60 damage per turn. 
If the target is already Poisoned, increase the Poison's damage by 60 instead.

name: Poisoned Arrow
effect:
Play this card when a Hero you control performs an Attack. Increase that Attack's damage by 10. 
Additionally, the target is Poisoned for the rest of the game. If the target is already Poisoned, increase the Poison's damage by 30 instead.

name: Poisoned Meat
effect: Choose a Creature any player controls. Deal 20 damage to it and Poison it for the rest of the game.

name: Poisoned Well
effect: Poison all targets your opponent controls for the rest of the game. If a target is already Poisoned, increase its Poison's damage by 30 instead.

name: Pollution Piranha
effect: You must remove a Pollution Token from your side of the board to summon this Creature. Summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn choose a target and deal 50 damage to it. When this Creature leaves the board, delete 1 card from your hand.

name: Pollution Spewer
effect: Place this into the free Support Zone of a Hero you control as a Creature. Once per turn, when a Pollution Token is removed from your side of the board, you may choose a target and deal 80 damage to it.

name: Pollution Token
effect: Your max hand size is reduced by 1, to a minimum of 1. If you ever have more cards in your hand than your max hand size, immediately delete cards from your hand until that is no longer the case.

name: Polymorph
effect: The Hero this Spell is attached to cannot use any Spells, but its Attack stat is increased by 80. This is treated as a negative status effect. If your opponent controls at least 1 Creature, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Populated Island Turtle
effect: This Creature takes up 3 Support Zones. While you control this Creature, you may once per turn draw until you have 10 cards in hand.

name: Possessed Blade of Sinister Vengeance
effect: This Artifact's Cost is multiplied by the number of Abilities currently attached to the Hero you equip it to. Whenever the equipped Hero hits exactly 1 target with an Attack, increase its damage by 20 times the number of Abilities attached to the user.

name: Potion Juggler
effect: You may delete a Potion from your hand or discard pile to summon this Creature as an additional Action. You may once per turn delete the top 3 cards from your Potion Deck to draw a card from your Potion Deck.

name: Potion of Greed
effect: Draw 2 cards from your Potion Deck. Skip your Action Phase this turn.

name: Powder Keg
effect:
Place this card into an opponent's Hero's Support Zone. While this card is placed into a Support Zone, it is treated as a Creature with 1 HP and the following effect: 
"When this Creature is defeated, deal 150 damage to all Creatures in the corresponding Hero's other Support Zones."

name: Prayer
effect: Attach this card to the user. You may once per turn discard any number of Abilities from your hand to draw the same number of cards. You may draw 1 extra card afterwards, but if you do, you cannot draw cards for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Premonition
effect:
1) You may once per turn search your deck for 1 card, reveal it and place it face-down on top of your deck.
Immediately end your turn afterwards.
2) You may once per turn search your deck for up to 2 cards, reveal them, and place them face-down on top of your deck in any order.
Immediately end your turn afterwards.
3) You may once per turn search your deck for up to 3 cards, reveal them, and place them face-down on top of your deck in any order.
Immediately end your turn afterwards.

name: Preserving Puppet Vinny
effect: This does not count as a Creature, but can still be chosen like one. Cannot be moved to a different Support Zone. You may once per turn put a Preserve Counter on all Creatures you control. When a Creature would be affected by an opponent's card or effect while it has a Preserve Counter on it, you may remove all Preserve Counters from all Creatures you control to negate all effects that card or effect would have on those Creatures. No other Token in the corresponding Hero's Support Zones can use its active effect for the rest of the turn afterwards. If the corresponding Hero's name is "Tri Ad, the Puppet Mistress", immediately replace this Token with a "Lucky Puppet Laki" Token.

name: Pressed Skill
effect: Choose an Ability from your deck, hand or discard pile and attach it to a Hero you control as an additional attachment.

name: Pressure Projectile
effect: Choose a target and deal 150 damage to it that cannot be reduced or negated. You may then choose any number of Spells attached/Artifacts equipped to the target and send them to the discard pile OR choose an Area on the board and send it to the discard pile.

name: Priest of Luna
effect: You may shuffle 5 Creatures with different names from your discard pile back into your deck to summon this Creature as an additional Action. Once per turn, when a target you control, except "Priest of Luna", takes damage, you may shuffle 2 Creatures with different names from your discard pile back into your deck to Burn any target on the board for the rest of the game.

name: Priest of Tempeste
effect: You may shuffle 5 Creatures with different names from your discard pile back into your deck to summon this Creature as an additional Action. Once per turn, when a target you control, except "Priest of Tempeste", would take damage, you may shuffle 2 Creatures with different names from your discard pile back into your deck to negate that damage.

name: Prophecy of Coolness
effect: Search your deck for any card and place it on top of your Coolness Stack. You can only play 1 "Prophecy of Coolness" per turn.

name: Prophecy of Tempeste
effect: Attach this card to a Hero you control. Once per turn, when another target you control would take damage, you may redirect that damage to this Hero. Damage this Hero would take cannot exceed 100. Damage this Hero takes cannot be be reduced or negated by other cards or effects.

name: Pseudonia, the Skill Devourer
effect: This Hero permanently gains the effects of all your opponent's Creatures it defeats with Attacks and Spells. Damage this Hero would take cannot be reduced or negated by its own effects and it cannot revive itself with its own effects. This Hero can only gain the effect of each Creature once.

name: Psychic Scout
effect:
You may once per turn summon a level 0 Creature from your hand as an additional Action. 
While you control this Creature, any damage your level 0 Creatures take is reduced by 100.

name: Punch in the Box
effect: Play this card immediately when a target you control takes damage from an opponent's card or effect. Choose a target your opponent controls and deal half that damage to it (rounded up).

name: Pure Advantage Camel
effect: Activate this Surprise when your opponent draws one or more cards outside their Resource Phase. Draw a card and place this Creature into one of the user's free Support Zones. You may once per turn move this Creature you control into the corresponding Hero's Surprise Zone face-down.

name: Pusher
effect:
Choose a Creature and deal 100 damage to it. 
If this damage defeats the Creature, your opponent must send all copies of that Creature from their deck and hand to their discard pile.

name: Pyraga
effect: Up to 4 times per turn, when a Creature activates its active effect for the first time that turn while you control this Creature, you may choose a target and deal 80 damage to it.

name: Pyramid of Schemers
effect:
Pay any amount of Gold to play this card. 
Both players may once per turn choose a Creature from their discard pile and summon it with one of their Heroes as an additional Action. 
Your opponent may at any time during their turn pay the same amount of Gold you spent to send this card to the discard pile.

name: Pyroblast
effect: Choose any number of targets and deal 100 damage to them. Place the same number of Pollution Tokens into your free Support Zones. You can only play 1 "Pyroblast" per turn.

name: Queen of Kings [B]
effect: While this Creature is on the board, its name is also treated as "Knight of Kings", "Bishop of Kings" and "Rook of Kings". While you control this Creature, the effects of other Creatures you control cannot be negated by negative status effects or your opponent's effects.

name: Queen of Kings [W]
effect: This card's level in your hand is reduced by the number of "of Kings" Creatures you control. Summoning this Creatures counts as an additional Action. You can only summon 1 "Queen of Kings" per turn. While this Creature and "Board of Kings" are on the board, this Creature's name is also treated as "Knight of Kings", "Bishop of Kings" and "Rook of Kings".

name: Quest of the Chosen One
effect: Attach this card to a Hero you control. You may send all Abilities attached to the target to the discard pile (min 1) to make this count as an additional Action. Whenever you attach 1 or more Abilities to this Hero, you may draw up to that many cards. You cannot draw more than 3 cards per turn with this effect.

name: Quetzahuitl, Receiver of Sacrifices
effect:
This cannot be one of your starting Heroes. Play this card in your main deck.
When the last Hero you control is defeated during your opponent's turn while this card is in your hand, delete all your Heroes and all cards in their Support and Ability Zones 
to place this card into one of your Hero Zones. Then, attach up to 3 copies of "Divinity" from your deck, hand or discard pile to this Hero. 
When this Hero is defeated, you immediately lose the game.

name: Quick Attack
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Base Attack stat to it. If this is the first Attack you use this turn, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Race Boat Captain
effect: The Cost of "Race Boat" Artifacts in your hand and on your side of the board becomes 4.

name: Racket Arrow
effect: Play this card when a Hero you control performs an Attack. Choose a Creature your opponent controls and return it to its original owner's hand.

name: Rafflesia, the Poison Princess
effect: Once per turn, during your Action Phase, when this Hero uses a Decay or Support Spell, it may immediately use a Spell of the other Spell School from your hand as an additional Action. This Hero still needs the Abilities necessary to use that Spell.

name: Ragnarock
effect: Play this card immediately when your opponent activates the effect of an Ability by deleting the top card from your Coolness Stack. Negate that Ability until the end of the turn and discard the top copy of it from the Hero that activated it.

name: Rain of Arrows
effect: Deal damage equal to 30 times the number of Creatures you control to all targets your opponent controls.

name: Rain of Death
effect: Delete all Abilities on the board that aren't Starting Abilities. Place 1 Pollution Token into your free Support Zones for every one of your opponent's removed Abilities in excess of the number of your removed Abilities.

name: Rain of Spores
effect: Discard any number of cards from your hand. Then, look at your opponent's hand and discard the same number of cards +1 from there. You cannot draw or add cards to your hand for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Rain Viola
effect: When this Artifact equipped to a Hero you control is sent to the discard pile, search your deck for any Attack or Spell, reveal it and add it to your hand. You can only activate this effect of "Rain Viola" once per turn.

name: Rainbow's Arrow
effect: Play this card when a Hero you control performs an Attack. Increase that Attack's damage by 10 and draw 2 cards.

name: Raise the Minions!
effect: Choose up to 3 "Skeleton" Creatures from your discard pile and place them into free Support Zones of the user.

name: Rakah, the Loan Shark

name: Slimy Slime
effect: When you summon this Creature, choose any target on the board and heal its HP by 80. You can only activate this effect once per turn. At the beginning of each of your turns, you may increase this Creature's level on your side of the board by 1.

name: Slippery Fridge
effect: Choose any number of Artifacts equipped to a Hero and equip them to a different Hero the same player controls (without paying their Cost again).

name: Slippery Ice
effect:
While this Area Spell remains on the board, both players may once per turn move as many Creatures they control as possible into free Support Zones of adjacent 
Heroes they control.

name: Slippery Narw
effect: At the beginning of each of your turns, place this Creature into the free Support Zone of an adjacent Hero, if possible. When this Creature is moved into a different Hero's Support Zone, you may choose any Creature on the board and defeat it. If it was a Creature you control, you may choose any Creature from your deck or discard pile, reveal it and add it to your hand.

name: Slippery Pengu
effect: At the beginning of each of your turns, place this Creature into the free Support Zone of an adjacent Hero, if possible. When this Creature is moved into a different Hero's Support Zone, you may immediately move another Creature you control, except "Slippery Pengu", into a free Support Zone of an adjacent undefeated Hero.

name: Slippery Polar
effect: At the beginning of each of your turns, place this Creature into the free Support Zone of an adjacent Hero, if possible. Once per turn, when this Creature is moved into a different Hero's Support Zone, that Hero may immediately use a Summoning Magic Spell from your hand as an additional Action.

name: Slippery Skates
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. You may once per turn move a Creature in one of the equipped Hero's Support Zones into the free Support Zone of an adjacent Hero.

name: Slippery Snobbit
effect: At the beginning of each of your turns, place this Creature into the free Support Zone of an adjacent Hero, if possible. When this Creature is moved into a different Hero's Support Zone, you may discard any number of cards and draw the same number of cards. If you discard at least 1 "Slippery" card, draw 1 additional card.

name: Slippery Snowman
effect: At the beginning of each of your turns, place this Creature into the free Support Zone of an adjacent Hero, if possible. When this Creature is moved into a different Hero's Support Zone while no Hero your opponent controls is Frozen, you may Freeze the opponent's Hero in the same position as the Hero in whose Support Zone this Creature was moved for 1 turn.

name: Slippery Spikeblock
effect: At the beginning of each of your turns, place this Creature into the free Support Zone of an adjacent Hero, if possible. When this Creature is moved into a different Hero's Support Zone, deal 80 damage to the opponent's Hero in the same position as the Hero in whose Support Zone this Creature was moved.

name: Slippery Whoolmoth
effect: If there is at least 1 Creature in a Support Zone of each of your Heroes, this Creature's level in your hand becomes 0. At the beginning of each of your turns, place this Creature into the free Support Zone of an adjacent Hero, if possible. When this Creature is moved into a different Hero's Support Zone, choose a target and deal 150 damage to it.

name: Slow
effect: Your opponent chooses 2/3/4 cards from their hand and discards them. You cannot interact with your opponent's hand for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Smoke Vial
effect: All Heroes your opponent controls are Blinded until the end of your next turn.

name: Smug Coin
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. When the equipped Hero's HP would drop to 0, they drop to 1 instead. Delete this card afterwards. You can only play 1 "Smug Coin" per game.

name: Smug Mastermind Antonia
effect: You may once per turn place a "Cool Rescuer Monia" from your hand or deck underneath this Creature. While this Creature has "Cool Rescuer Monia" attached to it, it gains 200 HP and this effect: Once per turn, when a Creature you control takes damage, you may discard a card to choose any card on the board that is not a Hero and send it to the discard pile.

name: Smugbeth, the Rebel of no Rules
effect: You may once per turn place a "Lizbeth, the Reaper of the Light" from your hand or deck underneath this Creature. While this Creature has "Lizbeth, the Reaper of the Light" attached to it, it gains 250 HP and this effect: You may use the active effects of your opponent's Heroes' Abilities as if they were attached to the corresponding Hero.

name: Smuggler's Pier
effect: Both players may once per turn, during their turn, pay a multiple of 5 Gold to draw a card for every 5 Gold paid, up to a maximum of 6. If a player draws cards through this effect, they cannot draw cards for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Smugness
effect:
1) You can only attach this Ability to an Ascended Hero. Whenever this Hero takes damage from an opponent's card or effect, you may choose a target and deal half that damage to it.
2) You can only attach this Ability to an Ascended Hero. Whenever this Hero takes damage from an opponent's card or effect, you may choose a target and deal the same damage to it.
3) You can only attach this Ability to an Ascended Hero. Whenever this Hero takes damage from an opponent's card or effect, you may choose a target and deal twice that damage to it.

name: Snake Race Boat
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Race Boat" Artifact equipped to it. You may once per turn choose as many Creatures with different names from your deck as there as Creatures in the corresponding Hero's Support Zones, reveal them, and add them to your hand.

name: Snow Cannon
effect: Choose a target your opponent controls and Freeze it for 1 turn.

name: Snowstorm Mischief
effect: Freeze all Creatures on the board for 2 turns.

name: Sol Rym, the Thunder Djinn
effect: This Hero may use the Spell "Chain Lightning" regardless of its level. This Hero can never perform more than 1 Action per turn.

name: Sorbereus, the Adapting Dragon
effect: You may once per turn choose a Hero and deal damage equal to its Attack stat to it.

name: Sorin, the Warden of Blood Rock
effect: This Hero can use level 3 or lower Attacks regardless of their level. This Hero cannot affect targets with Attacks, except if they are Bleeding.

name: Soul Absorption
effect:
Play this card immediately when a Hero is defeated.
That Hero cannot be healed or revived in any way for the rest of the game. Delete it and all cards in its Ability Zones.

name: Soul Shard Ba
effect: This Creature's effects don't get negated when it's summoned by the effect of Necromancy. When this Creature is summoned from your discard pile, you may perform a second Action during your Action Phase this turn with the corresponding Hero. You can only summon 1 "Soul Shard Ba" per turn.

name: Soul Shard Ib
effect:
This Creature's effects don't get negated when it's summoned by the effect of Necromancy. 
When this Creature is summoned from your discard pile, you may heal the corresponding Hero's HP for 40 times the number of different Creatures in your discard pile. 
You can only summon 1 "Soul Shard Ib" per turn.

name: Soul Shard Ka
effect: This Creature's effects don't get negated when it's summoned by the effect of Necromancy. When this Creature is summoned from your discard pile, you may search your deck for any level 0/1/2 or lower Creature and immediately summon it as an additional Action, but negate its effects until the end of the turn. You can only summon 1 "Soul Shard Ka" per turn.

name: Soul Shard Khet
effect:
This Creature's effects don't get negated when it's summoned by the effect of Necromancy. 
When this Creature is summoned from your discard pile, you may immediately summon a Creature from your discard pile with any of your Heroes as an additional Action. 
You can only summon 1 "Soul Shard Khet" per turn.

name: Soul Shard Ren
effect: This Creature's effects don't get negated when it's summoned by the effect of Necromancy. When this Creature is summoned from your discard pile, you may search your deck for any card, reveal it and add it to your hand OR send it to your discard pile. You can only summon 1 "Soul Shard Ren" per turn.

name: Soul Shard Sah
effect: This Creature's effects don't get negated when it's summoned by the effect of Necromancy. When this Creature is summoned by the effect of Necromancy, you may choose any other Creature in your discard pile. This Creature gains that Creature's effect while it remains on the board. You can only summon 1 "Soul Shard Sah" per turn.

name: Soul Shard Sekhem
effect: This Creature's effects don't get negated when it's summoned by the effect of Necromancy. When this Creature is summoned from your discard pile, choose a target and deal damage equal to 50 times the number of different "Soul Shard" Creatures on the board (including this one) to it. You can only summon 1 "Soul Shard Sekhem" per turn.

name: Soul Shard Shut
effect:
This Creature's effects don't get negated when it's summoned by the effect of Necromancy. 
When this Creature is summoned from your discard pile, you may send the top 5 cards of your deck to your discard pile. 
You can only summon 1 "Soul Shard Shut" per turn.

name: Soul Transmigration Ritual
effect: Sacrifice 3 level 0 Creatures you control to use this Spell. Choose a defeated Hero you control and revive it, healing its HP completely. If the user has at least Decay Magic 1, this counts as an additional Action. The next time the revived Hero is defeated, delete it and all cards in its Ability and Support Zones.

name: Spacial Crevice
effect: You may control up to 3 total Areas. At the end of each turn, the turn player may search their deck for an Area, reveal it and add it to their hand.

name: Sparkfly Architect
effect:
When you summon this Creature, you may search your deck for a "Sparkfly" card or "Hive's Crown", reveal it and add it to your hand. When this Creature is sacrificed to summon "Sparkfly Queen", it gains this effect:
"*You may once per turn draw cards until you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent."

name: Sparkfly Attendant
effect:
While you control this Creature, "Sparkfly Queen" Creatures you control are unaffected by your opponent's cards and effects. When this Creature is sacrificed to summon "Sparkfly Queen", it gains this effect:
"*This Creature is unaffected by your opponent's cards and effects, except damage."

name: Sparkfly Queen
effect: You can only control 1 "Sparkfly Queen". This Creature cannot be summoned, except by the effect of "Hive's Crown". You may once per turn declare a card type (Attack/Spell, Ability, Artifact, Potion, Hero) and make your opponent choose as many cards of that type from their deck as you control "Sparkfly" Creatures (or as many as possible) and add them to your hand. The corresponding Hero may use Attacks and Spells added to your hand that way as if their levels were reduced by 3.

name: Sparkfly Worker
effect:
When you summon this Creature while you control a "Sparkfly Queen", you may choose a card on the board that is not a Hero and add it to your hand. You can only use this effect once per turn. When this Creature is sacrificed to summon "Sparkfly Queen", it gains this effect:
"*You may once per turn make your opponent choose any card on their side of the board that is not a Hero and add it your hand."

name: Sparky Slime
effect: When you summon this Creature, choose any target on the board and negate its effects and Abilities until your next turn. This counts as a negative status effect. You can only activate this effect once per turn. At the beginning of each of your turns, you may increase this Creature's level on your side of the board by 1.

name: Sparrow, the Buffoon of the Treasure Cave
effect: You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Sparrow, the Bumbling Buffoon" you control that has "Skullmael's Greatsword" equipped to it and "Elixir of Immortality" attached to it as an Ability. This condition cannot be negated or substituted. Whenever a Potion resolves (no matter who played it), you may summon it as a Creature with no level into this Hero's free Support Zone. Potions summoned this way have 50 HP and may once per turn use their effect.
startingAbility1: Play the top 3 cards of your Potion Deck, if possible

name: Sparrow, the Bumbling Baffoon
effect: You cannot level up this Hero's Abilities by attaching copies of them to it. Up to 2 times per turn, when you play a Potion, you may place it on top of any of this Hero's Abilities as an additional attachment after it resolved. Potions placed this way become copies of the Ability they're placed on top of while they remain on the board. When a Potion attached by this effect leaves the board to anywhere, delete it.

name: Spearman
effect: Once per turn, when your opponent activates one of their Creatures' once per turn effects, you may negate that effect and deal 50 damage to that Creature instead.

name: Spell Shackle
effect: At the beginning of each turn of the controller of the Hero this card is attached to, that Hero takes 50 damage for every Spell School Ability attached to it.

name: Spice Mortar
effect: Reveal the top 10 cards of your opponent's deck. Add a Potion from among those cards to your hand, if possible. Your opponent may shuffle their deck afterwards.

name: Spider Avalanche
effect:
Activate this Surprise when this Hero is hit by an opponent's Attack, Spell or Creature effect. 
Deal damage equal to 20 times the number of Creatures you control to all targets your opponent controls.

name: Spider Dance
effect: Search your deck for up to as many different Surprises as you control "Spider" Creatures, reveal them and add them to your hand. You may then immediately summon a "Spider" Creature as an additional Action.

name: Spider Hive
effect: The levels of all face-down Surprises on the board are reduced by the number of "Spider" Creatures on the board until they are activated.

name: Spider Silk Bridge
effect: Activate this Surprise when your opponent ends their turn without dealing damage to any target you control that turn. Draw 2 cards. Additionally, this card remains face-up in the user's Surprise Zone until your opponent deals damage to a target you control. If this card is face-up in your Hero's Surprise Zone at the beginning of your turn, draw 1 card.

name: Spike Trap
effect: Activate this Surprise when the user is chosen by an Attack or Spell. Negate the Attack or Spell and inflict 200 damage to the attacker. Your opponent may discard 2 cards from their hand to negate this effect.

name: Spiky Armor
effect: Play this card immediately when a target you control takes damage from an Attack. The attacker takes the same amount of damage as recoil.

name: Spirit of the Barbarian Sword
effect: This Creature can only be summoned by a Hero equipped with "Legendary Sword of a Barbarian King". When you summon this Creature, send all Areas on the board to the discard pile. Then, if you have sent at least 1 Area, deal 100 damage to all targets your opponent controls. You may once per turn send all Areas on the board to the discard pile (min. 1) to bring a level 3 or lower Area from your deck directly into play.

name: Spirit of the Forbidden Grimoire
effect: This Creature can only be summoned by a Hero equipped with "Forbidden Grimoire of a Forgotten Sorcerer". This Creature may once per turn use the active effects of up to 2 different Creatures on the board, except "Spirit of the Forbidden Grimoire". Both effects are performed at the same time. Effects used by this Creature cannot be used another time for the rest of the turn in any way afterwards.

name: Spirit of the Heart Bow
effect: This Creature can only be summoned by a Hero equipped with "Heart-Shaped Bow, the Final Proof of Cuteness". You may once per turn choose a Creature your opponent controls and take permanent control of it, placing it into a free Support Zone of the corresponding Hero.

name: Spirit of the Relic Hammer
effect: This Creature can only be summoned by a Hero equipped with "Earth-Shattering Hammer, Relic of Deri". The first 3 Creatures both players summon during each of their turns may use their active effects the turn they are summoned.

name: Spirit of the Shattered Trident
effect: This Creature can only be summoned by a Hero equipped with "Shattered Trident, Treasure of the Deepsea". Whenever Artifacts equipped to Heroes you control would be moved from the board to anywhere except your hand, you may discard 1 card to add them back to your hand instead, and if you do, gain Gold equal to half their Cost (rounded up).

name: Spirit of the Super-Killing Knife
effect: This Creature can only be summoned by a Hero equipped with "Super-Killing Knife, the Tool of Liquidation". When you summon this Creature, you may choose any other Creature on the board and defeat it. While this Creature remains on the board, any Hero or Creature that is defeated is deleted. When a Hero is deleted by this effect, delete all cards in its Ability Zones.

name: Spirit of the Ultimate Gun
effect: This Creature can only be summoned by a Hero equipped with "Ancient Tech Infinite Energy Core". While you control this Creature, all damage other Creatures (yours and your opponent's) deal with their active effects is doubled, but cannot be increased by other effects.

name: Splashy Slime
effect: When you summon this Creature, gain 4 Gold for every  Creature you control with a different name and an original level of 0 (including this one). You can only activate this effect once per turn. At the beginning of each of your turns, you may increase this Creature's level on your side of the board by 1.

name: Spontaneous Reappearance
effect: Choose any number of cards from your discard pile and add them to your hand. Place half that many Pollution Tokens into your free Support Zones (rounded up). This counts as an additional Action. Immediately end your turn afterwards.

name: Spreading Rumor
effect: Declare a card name. Your opponent must discard all copies of the declared card from their hand. If at least 1 card is discarded by this effect, you may make this count as an additional Action, but if you do, you cannot interact with your opponent's hand for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Spy in the Enemy's Camp
effect: Play this card immediately when your opponent summons a Creature. At the start of each turn, control of that Creature goes to the turn player.

name: Staff of Illusions
effect: Choose a level 3 or lower Creature from your deck or hand and place it into the Support Zone of any Hero you control. This Artifact's Cost is multiplied by the Creature's level. At the end of your opponent's next turn, shuffle the Creature back into your deck. You cannot summon other Creatures that turn.

name: Staff of the Teleporter
effect: Shuffle any number of cards from your hand into your deck and draw the same number of cards. If you shuffle your entire hand, draw that number +1 instead. You cannot draw cards or move any cards out of your discard pile for the rest of the turn.

name: Staff of Uncontrollable Destruction
effect: Discard your entire hand and draw the same number of cards +1. You cannot draw or move cards out of your discard pile for the rest of the turn.

name: Stealth
effect:
1) This Hero cannot be chosen by your opponent's level 1 or lower Attacks/Spells while you control other Heroes that can be chosen.
2) This Hero cannot be chosen by your opponent's level 2 or lower Attacks/Spells while you control other Heroes that can be chosen.
3) This Hero cannot be chosen by your opponent's level 3 or lower Attacks/Spells while you control other Heroes that can be chosen.

name: Stealthy Pursuit
effect: Play this card immediately when one of your Heroes that can use this Spell performs a different Attack or Spell. Until the end of your next turn, that Hero cannot be chosen by your opponent's cards or effects while you control another Hero that can be chosen by them. Delete this card.

name: Steam Dwarf Brewer
effect: Once per turn, when you discard 1 or more cards, this Creature's current and max HP are increased by 50. You may once per turn set the current and max HP of another Creature you control equal to this Creature's max HP.

name: Steam Dwarf Diver
effect: Once per turn, when you discard 1 or more cards, this Creature's current and max HP are increased by 50. You may once per turn reduce this Creature's current and max HP by 100 to search your deck for a card, reveal it and add it to your hand.

name: Steam Dwarf Dragon Pilot
effect: You can only summon this Creature by sacrificing 2 or more Creatures you control that were not summoned this turn and whose combined max HP are 300 or higher. If you only sacrifice level 1 or lower Creatures, summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action. Up to 3 times per turn, when you discard 1 or more cards from your hand, choose a target and deal 100 damage to it.

name: Steam Dwarf Engineer
effect: Once per turn, when you discard 1 or more cards, this Creature's current and max HP are increased by 50. You may once per turn sacrifice this Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to place any Creature from your deck whose max HP is less than or equal to this Creature's current HP into its Support Zone. If that Creature would require additional sacrifices, negate those sacrifices.

name: Steam Dwarf Exterminator
effect: Once per turn, when you discard 1 or more cards, this Creature's current and max HP are increased by 50. You may once per turn choose a target and deal damage equal to this Creature's current HP to it. This damage cannot exceed 200.

name: Steam Dwarf Miner
effect: Once per turn, when you discard 1 or more cards, this Creature's current and max HP are increased by 50. At the end of each of your turns, draw 1 card for every 100 max HP this Creature has.

name: Stellan, the Calm Cat
effect: Once per turn, when this Hero is affected by an opponent's card or effect or takes any damage, you may immediately place up to 3 level 0 Creatures with different names from your hand into its free Support Zones.

name: Stellin, the Calm Dictator
effect: You may once per turn place a "Stellan, the Calm Cat" from your hand or deck underneath this Creature. While this Creature has "Stellan, the Calm Cat" attached to it, it gains 200 HP and this effect: Once per turn, when this Creature takes damage, you may summon up to 3 level 0 Creatures with different names from your hand as additional Actions.

name: Sticky Wand
effect: Choose a Hero you control and immediately have it use an Attachment Attack/Spell from your hand as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Sticky Wand" per turn.

name: Stinky Stables
effect: While this Area remains in play, Poisoned targets cannot be healed (not their HP and not from being Poisoned).

name: Stoneskin
effect: All damage the Hero this card is attached to receives from Attacks is reduced by 80, and it cannot be Poisoned, Burned or Stunned.

name: Storm Piano
effect: When this Artifact equipped to a Hero you control is sent to the discard pile, prevent any damage the previously equipped Hero would take until the end of your next turn. You can only activate this effect of "Storm Piano" once per turn. A Hero can only be equipped with 1 "Storm Piano" per game.

name: Storm Ring
effect: Play this card immediately when your opponent plays a Spell that would hit more than 1 target. Negate that Spell.

name: Stormkissed Waflav
effect: You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Waflav" Hero you control by removing 1 Evolution Counter from it. Ascending this Hero does not end your turn. When you Ascend this Hero, place 2 Evolution Counters on it. You may once per turn Descend this Hero to place 1 Evolution Counter onto it.

name: Stowaway
effect: Summon this Creature into the free Support Zone of any Hero. The corresponding Hero's effect and Abilities are negated. This counts as a negative status effect. This Creature is unaffected by all other cards and effects, but if the status effect it inflicted is removed from the corresponding Hero, it is deleted.

name: Stranglehold
effect: Choose a target and deal 50 damage to it times the number of negative status effects it is inflicted with. If the user has at least Fighting 1, this damage is increased by the attacker's Attack stat.

name: String of Fine
effect: This card has no effect when you play it from your hand. If this is the top card of your Coolness Stack, you may play it from there as an additional Action by deleting it. Choose a target you control. Any damage that target would take until the beginning of your next turn becomes 0. A target can only be affected by this effect once per game.

name: Strong Ox Headbutt
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the user's base Attack stat to it. Your opponent must then discard 1 card of their choice. If this is the second Attack you used this turn, your opponent must discard 2 cards instead. If this is the third Attack, you may also choose an Ability attached to the target and send it to the discard pile, if possible.

name: Strong Shield
effect: Play this card immediately when a target you control would take  300 or more damage. Negate that damage (but not other effects associated with it) to that target.

name: Stubborn Getaway
effect:
Play this card immediately when an Attack or Spell of a Hero you control that can use this Spell would be negated or redirected. Negate the effect that would negate or 
redirect the Attack or Spell.

name: Styx, the Gate to the Spirit World
effect: Whenever another Hero is defeated (no matter who controlled it), you may permanently increase this Hero's current and max HP by 100 each.

name: Styx, the Opened Gate
effect: You must play this card on top of a "Styx, the Gate to the Spirit World" after Heroes have been revived at least 3 times this game. This condition cannot be negated or substituted. This Ascended Hero's stats are equal to its base Hero's stats when Ascending. You may once per turn revive a defeated Hero either player controls for the rest of the turn with 100 HP. You take control of the Hero while it is revived by this effect.

name: Summoning Circle
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. When the equipped Hero summons a Creature, that Creature's current and max HP are doubled. This bonus is applied before any other bonuses to the Creature's HP. A Hero can only be equipped with 1 "Summoning Circle".

name: Summoning Instructions
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. While this card is equipped to a Hero, that Hero can use level 3 or lower Summoning Spells up to X levels higher than its Summoning Magic level.

name: Summoning Magic
effect:
1) Allows the use of Summoning Spells up to Level 1.
2) Allows the use of Summoning Spells up to Level 2.
3) Allows the use of Summoning Spells up to Level 3.

name: Sun Beam
effect: Choose up to 3 cards on the board that aren't Heroes and send them to the discard pile. Place the same number of Pollution Tokens into your free Support Zones.

name: Super Fan
effect: You may once per turn reveal the top card of your deck. If it is an Ability, immediately attach it to a Hero you control as an additional attachment, if possible. Otherwise, put it on top or bottom of your deck (your choice).

name: Super-Killing Knife, the Tool of Liquidation
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. The equipped Hero's Attack stat is increased by 10. Creatures that are hit by the Hero with an Attack are defeated.

name: Supply Chain
effect: Draw until you have 7 cards in your hand.

name: Support Magic
effect:
1) Allows the use of Support Spells up to Level 1.
2) Allows the use of Support Spells up to Level 2.
3) Allows the use of Support Spells up to Level 3.

name: Surefire Shot
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to it. This Attack can always choose any target and damage it deals cannot be reduced or negated. This Attack cannot be negated or reacted to.

name: Surprise Party
effect: Reveal the top card of your deck until you reveal a level 3 or lower Creature. Place that Creature into one of the user's free Support Zones, if possible. If the Creature's level is higher than the user's Support Magic level, your opponent draws 2 cards times the difference. Shuffle all other revealed cards back into your deck.

name: Surprising Opportunity
effect:
Play this card immediately when a Hero (yours or your opponent's) is defeated. Choose up to 2 cards that were attached or equipped to that Hero and add them to your 
hand.

name: Suspicious Monster
effect: You may sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to summon this Creature as an additional Action into the same Support Zone. You may once per turn choose a target and deal 100 damage to it.

name: Swagdri, Forger of Coolness
effect: When this Creature is the top card of your Coolness Stack, you may summon it as an additional Action from there during your turn. Once per turn, if the top card of your Coolness Stack is an Artifact, you may immediately play it for half its Cost as if it was part of your hand. If you do, delete the Artifact if it would be sent to the discard pile.

name: Swampborne Waflav
effect: You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Waflav" Hero you control by removing 2 Evolution Counters from it. Ascending this Hero does not end your turn. Whenever a target is Poisoned, place 1 Evolution Counter onto this Hero. You may once per turn Descend this Hero to place 1 Evolution Counter onto it.

name: Swellpnir, Mount of Coolness
effect: This card has no effect, unless you play it from your Coolness Stack. If this is the top card of your Coolness Stack, you may equip it to one of your Heroes from there. The equipped Hero can perform an additional Action once per turn, but it can only use that Action for an Attack.

name: Swift Eagle Warrior
effect: You may remove 1 Doom Counter from a "Doom Clock" on the board to summon this Creature from your hand as an additional Action. You can only summon 1 "Swift Eagle Warrior" per turn this way. You may once per turn place a Doom Counter onto a "Doom Clock" on the board. Once per turn, when a Doom Counter is placed onto a "Doom Clock", draw 1 card.

name: Sword in a Bottle
effect: Choose a Hero you control and a target your opponent controls. Deal damage equal to your Hero's Attack stat to the opponent's target. This is treated as an Attack. You can only play 1 "Sword in a Bottle" per turn.

name: Tail Slap
effect: Your opponent may defeat any number of Creatures they control. Then, choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to it. That damage is increased by 50 for every Creature your opponent controls.

name: Taio, Absorber of the Mountain's Heart
effect: You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Taio, the Sun Fencer" you control that is equipped with "The Sun Sword" and has defeated a Hero your opponent controls with an Attack or Destruction Magic Spell this game. Once per turn, during your turn, when this Hero performs an Attack or Destruction Magic Spell, it may immediately perform a Destruction Magic Spell or Attack (whichever it didn't use) from your deck or hand as an additional Action.

name: Taio, the Sun Fencer
effect: While this Hero has an Artifact with a cost of 10 or more equipped to it, all Destruction Spells it uses have their levels reduced by this Hero's Fighting level. This Hero's Attack stat is increased by 20 for every Artifact equipped to it.

name: Tamed Hell Fox
effect: When this Creature is summoned via an effect, you may immediately search your deck for a up to 2 cards with different names, reveal them, and add them to your hand. If you searched 2 cards, delete this Creature and you cannot play them or cards with those names for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Tamed Primordium
effect: When this Creature is summoned via an effect, except the effect of "Tamed Primordium", you may immediately summon up to 2 level 1 or lower Creatures from your hand as additional Actions. If you summon 2 Creatures this way, delete this Creature and you cannot summon Creatures for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: Tanuki Escape
effect: Delete 1 "Rebelliokai Timid Tanuki" from your discard pile to play this card. Shuffle up to as many cards from your hand as you have "Rebelliokai" Creatures with different names in your discard pile back into your deck (max 3). Then, search your deck for up to that many cards with different names, reveal them and add them to your hand. Immediately end your turn afterwards.

name: Tarleinn the Traveler
effect: Once per turn, when a Hero you control with two or more different Spell Schools attached to it uses a Spell, you may choose a target you control and heal its HP by 40/80/150, depending on the Spell's level.

name: Tarleinn's Floating Island
effect: If the user is "Tarleinn the Traveler", using  this Spell counts as an additional Action. Once per turn, when a target a player controls has its HP healed, that player may draw 1 card.

name: Taunting Elephant
effect: At the beginning of each of your turns, choose a target and deal damage equal to 40 times the number of Creatures on the board that do not have an active effect to it.

name: Tazune, the Angry Hot-Blood
effect: The first two times every turn this Hero would take damage from your own cards or effects (including recoil damage) are reduced to 0.

name: Tea
effect: Choose a target you control and heal it from any number of negative status effects. If you do, choose a different target and inflict those status effects to it.

name: Teal Fishing Rod
effect: Choose a level 0 Creature from your discard pile that was not sent there this turn and place it into the free Support Zone of any Hero you control. You can only play 1 "Teal Fishing Rod" per turn.

name: Tearing Mountain
effect: While this Area remains in play, any effects that would prevent targets from being Burned are negated. At the start of a player's turn, that player must choose a target they control and Burn it for the rest of the game.

name: Tears of Creation
effect: Gain 5 Gold for every target you control.

name: Techno Harpyformer
effect: If this is the first Creature you summon during your turn, summoning it counts as an additional Action. When you summon this Creature, you may search your deck for an Inventing Ability, reveal it and add it to your hand. You may once per turn discard an Inventing Ability to draw 2 cards.

name: Telekinesis
effect: Flip a Surprise in the Surprise Zone of one of your Heroes face-up and choose a Hero your opponent controls. That Surprise affects that Hero as if it had met its activation condition.

name: Teleport
effect: Play this card immediately when a Hero you control would be affected by a Surprise. Negate all effects that Surprise would have on that Hero.

name: Teleportal
effect: Search your deck for a card and place it openly in front of you. At the beginning of your next turn, add it to your hand. If this is the first Spell you use this turn, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Teleportation Powder
effect: Choose any undefeated Hero on the board and remove it, its Abilities, and all cards equipped or attached to it from the game completely. At the beginning of your next turn, return those cards to the Zones they were removed from. A player does not lose the game, even if all their other Heroes are defeated. You can only play 1 "Teleportation Powder" per game.

name: Tempeluna, the Convergence Fairy
effect: You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Luna, the Flame Fairy" or "Tempeste, the Weather Fairy" you control by deleting the other one you control and all Abilities attached to it. This Hero gains the effect of the Hero it Ascended from. You may once per turn attach a "Fairy" Hero from your hand to this Hero. This Hero gains the effects of all "Fairy" Heroes attached to it. This Hero can only gain the same effect once.
startingAbility1: Add 1 "Fairy" Hero from your deck to your hand

name: Tempeste Moana, the Rain Singer
effect: The first 2 Artifacts equipped and Spells attached to any Hero each turn also count as Creatures with 50 HP. If an Artifact's or Spell's HP are reduced to 0, it is sent to the discard pile. Equipping an Artifact or attaching a Spell also counts as summoning it as a Creature.

name: Tempeste, the Weather Fairy
effect: Any damage your other Heroes take from any source is reduced by 100. Damage this Hero takes cannot be reduced or negated.

name: Temple of Sacrifice
effect: You may sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to play this card as an additional Action. Everytime a player sacrifices 1 or more Creatures, they may draw 1 card. Everytime a player sacrifices 1 or more Heroes, they may draw 3 cards.

name: Tengu Windstorm
effect: Delete 1 "Rebelliokai Terror Tengu" from your discard pile to play this card. Choose any card on the board that is not a Hero and place it on top or bottom its controller's deck. If this is the first Action you perform this turn, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Teocuilatl, the Embodiment of Gods
effect: You may once per turn sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to gain 10 Gold OR a Hero you control to gain 30 Gold. After you sacrificed a Hero with this effect, immediately end your turn. You can only sacrifice 1 Hero per game with this effect.

name: Teppes, the Deepsea Vampire
effect: Up to 5 times per turn, when 1 or more cards are added from your Heroes' Support Zones to your hand, you may draw 1 card.

name: Terror
effect:
1) After a player resolved a total of 9 cards or effects with different names during their turn, their turn immediately moves to the End Phase.
2) After a player resolved a total of 8 cards or effects with different names during their turn, their turn immediately moves to the End Phase.
3) After a player resolved a total of 7 cards or effects with different names during their turn, their turn immediately moves to the End Phase.

name: Test Dummy
effect: Once per turn, when the corresponding Hero would be chosen by an Attack or Spell, you may redirect that Attack/Spell to this Creature instead. Damage this Creature takes cannot be reduced or negated. If this Creature is defeated by a redirected Attack or Spell, draw as many cards as there are Artifacts equipped to all your Heroes.

name: Test Flight
effect: Play this card immediately when a Hero you control that can use this Spell would be hit by an Attack or Spell whose level is lower than that Hero's Magic Arts level. Negate all effects the Attack/Spell would have on that Hero (including damage).

name: Tharx, the Never-Losing General
effect: You may once per turn draw half as many cards as you control Creatures (rounded up).

name: Tharxian Horse
effect: Activate this Surprise when the user is chosen by an Attack or Spell. Negate the Attack/Spell and inflict 50 damage to the attacker times the number of targets you control. Then, if this damage defeated the attacker, you may immediately choose a Creature from your discard pile and summon it as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Tharxian Horse" per game.

name: The Archmage
effect: Once per turn, during your turn, when you discard a Spell from your hand, except a Creature, you may immediately use that Spell as an additional Action with this Hero after you discarded it, but if you do, increase its level by 1 for the duration of this use. This Hero can never perform 2 of the same Spell during 1 turn.

name: The Bonegrinder
effect: This Spell's level in your hand is reduced by the number of "Skeleton" Creatures in your discard pile. You may delete a "Skeleton" Creature from your discard pile to make this Spell count as an additional Action. Up to 5 times per turn, when a "Skeleton" Creature would be sent to your discard pile, you may delete it to draw 1 card.

name: The Brewer's Blade
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. Once per turn, when the equipped Hero performs an Attack, draw 1 card from your Potion Deck.

name: The Core's Awakening
effect:
Play this card immediately when you play an Artifact. Choose up to 1/2/3 copies of that Artifact from your deck and send them to your discard pile before the Artifact's effect 
resolves.

name: The Cosmic Depths
effect: Both players may once per turn shuffle a card from their hand back into their deck to search their deck for a Creature with a different level from all Creatures they currently control and summon it with one of their Heroes as an additional Action, but negate its effects until the end of the turn.

name: The Creepy Clown of Heaven
effect: While you control this Creature, negate the effects of all other Creatures on the board. Either player may spend an Action during their turn to defeat this Creature. If they do, the effects of all Creatures stay negated for the rest of the turn.

name: The Egg of God
effect: Sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to summon this Creature. Summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action. Damage this Creature takes is negated. If you control this Creature at the beginning of your turn, sacrifice it to search your deck for any level 3 or lower Creature, except "The Egg of God", and place it into the same Support Zone. That Creature may use its active effect this turn.

name: The Eighth Circle of Hell
effect: When this card is deleted by another card's effect and you have not played a deleted Area yet this turn, you may immediately delete all Areas you control and play this deleted Spell as an additional Action. Whenever a player draws 1 or more cards through an effect, their opponent may delete this card from the board to draw the same number of cards.

name: The Eye of Ren
effect: Choose a card from your deck and send it to your discard pile. You cannot move cards out of your discard pile for the rest of the turn unless you pay an additional 6 Gold.

name: The Fifth Circle of Hell
effect: When this card is deleted by an effect and you have not played a deleted Area yet this turn, you may immediately delete all Areas you control and play this deleted Spell as an additional Action. When this card is sent to the discard pile or deleted from the board, the next damage that exactly 1 target takes this turn is doubled. You can only activate this effect once per turn.

name: The Final Trial
effect: This card has no effect unless you have played at least 1 "Trial of Dominance", 1 "Trial of Loyalty", 1 "Trial of Knowledge", 1 "Trial of Annoyance" and 1 "Trial of Coolness" this game. This must be the first Action you perform this turn. You win the game.

name: The First Circle of Hell
effect:
At the beginning of either player's turn, if the number of cards in that player's discard pile is odd, delete them all. 
At the end of either player's turn, if the number of that player's deleted cards is even, return them all to their discard pile.

name: The Fourth Circle of Hell
effect: When this card is deleted by an effect and you have not played a deleted Area yet this turn, you may immediately delete all Areas you control and play this deleted Spell as an additional Action. When this card on your side of the board is sent to the discard pile or deleted, gain Gold equal to the number of your deleted cards.

name: The Golden Abomination
effect: Any Gold your opponent would gain during their Resource Phase while their Gold is not 0 goes to you instead.

name: The Golden Gate
effect: Whenever a Creature is placed into a player's Support Zone, that player gains 2 Gold.

name: The Great Clock Tower "Big Gwen"
effect: You don't have to delete cards from your hand immediately when you exceed your max hand size while controlling Pollution Tokens (but your max hand size is still reduced).

name: The Great Wall of Deri
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. While you control this card, Creatures you control cannot be chosen by your opponents cards or effects, except if they deal direct damage.

name: The Hands of Big Gwen
effect: The equipped Hero's Attack stat is increased by 10. Once per turn, when the equipped Hero hits one or more targets with an Attack, its controller may choose a card from their discard pile that is not an Attack and add it to their hand.

name: The Light Brigade Marches
effect:
Delete up to 3 cards from your hand. Then, add the same number of cards +1 from your discard pile to your hand. 
You can only play 1 "The Light Brigade Marches" per turn.

name: The Master's Key
effect: You can only play this card if you have not performed any Actions yet this turn. Choose a level 3 Creature in your hand and place it into the free Support Zone of any Hero you control, but negate its effects for the rest of the turn. You cannot perform an Action for the rest of the turn. This Artifact's Cost is reduced by 5 times the combined Decay Magic levels of all Heroes you control. You can only play 1 "The Master's Key" per turn.

name: The Master's Orders
effect: Attach this card to a Hero your opponent controls. While this card is attached to a Hero, your opponent may perform Actions with it as if they controlled it, but they cannot make it choose itself as a target for an Attack or Spell. This is treated as a status effect.

name: The Master's Plan
effect: Immediately play this card when your opponent plays any card from their hand. Negate that card. If your opponent spent an Action on it, they may immediately perform a different Action instead. You can only play 1 "The Master's Plan" per turn.

name: The Master's Spy
effect: At the start of each turn, both players choose a random card from their opponent's hand. Trade those cards. This effect only activates if both players have at least 1 card in their hand.

name: The Master's Sword
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. The equipped Hero's Attack stat is increased by 10. Additionally, as long as the Hero's HP are greater than or equal to their maximum, the Hero deals additional damage equal to its Attack stat when it hits a single target with an Attack.

name: The Melting
