effect: Play this card immediately when one or more targets you control are Frozen by an opponent's effect during their turn. Heal 1 target you control from its Freeze. If the user has at least Destruction Magic 1, immediately end your opponent's turn afterwards.

name: The Nornstellar, Foretellers of Coolness
effect:
You may once per turn choose 1 card each from your hand and discard pile. 
Take those 2 cards and the top card of your deck and place them on top of your Coolness Stack on any order. Draw 1 card afterwards.

name: The Oracle of Heaven
effect: When you play this card,  draw 1 card. Then, flip your deck upside-down. While this Creature remains in play, your deck remains upside-down and what would otherwise be the top card of your deck becomes the bottom card of your deck and vice versa.

name: The Root of all Evil
effect: You may once per turn choose a Creature from your discard pile, except "The Root of all Evil", and place it into the free Support Zone of any Hero you control. The HP of Creatures summoned this way become 1. Creatures that would be sent to either player's discard pile are deleted instead.

name: The Root of all Presents
effect: You may once per turn add any number of cards from your hand to your opponent's hand to draw the same number of cards.

name: The Sacred Blade
effect: If you have 4 copies of this card in your deck, your deck may contain 5 copies of every Attack and Spell.

name: The Sacred Jewel
effect: If you have 4 copies of this card in your deck, your deck may contain 5 copies of every Artifact. When you play this card, you may make both players draw 1 card, but if you do, you cannot draw any cards for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: The Sacred Mirror
effect: If you have 4 copies of this card in your deck, your deck may contain up to 80 cards. If you play this card while there are more than 60 cards in your deck, draw 2 cards.

name: The Second Circle of Hell
effect: When this card is deleted by an effect and you have not played a deleted Area yet this turn, you may immediately delete all Areas you control and play this deleted Spell as an additional Action. When this card on your side of the board is sent to the discard pile or deleted, you may choose one of your deleted cards and add it to your hand.

name: The Seventh Circle of Hell
effect: When this card is deleted by an effect and you have not played a deleted Area yet this turn, you may immediately delete all Areas you control and play this deleted Spell as an additional Action. At the end of each turn, the turn player must choose a target they control and deal 100 damage to it. When this card on the board is sent to the discard pile or deleted, choose a target and deal 150 damage to it.

name: The Sixth Circle of Hell
effect: When this card is deleted by an effect and you have not played a deleted Area yet this turn, you may immediately delete all Areas you control and play this deleted Spell as an additional Action. When this card on your side of the board is sent to the discard pile or deleted, you may choose a Hero your opponent controls and take control of it for the rest of the turn. If you do, that Hero is unaffected by your other cards and effects until the end of the turn.

name: The Spawn Mother
effect: When this Creature is summoned from your hand, deal 100 damage to all Heroes your opponent controls OR to all targets on the board, except this Creature. You may spend an Action to add this Creature you control to your hand.

name: The Stormblade
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. Whenever the equipped Hero performs an Action, shuffle your entire hand back into the deck and draw the same number of cards afterwards. Whenever your opponent hits the equipped Hero with a card or effect, they must shuffle their entire hand back into their deck and draw the same number of cards afterwards. These draw effects cannot be prevented.

name: The Sun Sword
effect:
Equip this card to a Hero you control. The equipped Hero's Attack stat is increased by 20. Additionally, targets you control cannot be Frozen and any target hit 
by an Attack of the equipped Hero is Burned for the rest of the game. Thaw all Frozen targets you control.

name: The Thing in the Ship
effect: While this Creature remains on the board, neither player can activate the active effects of their Abilities.

name: The Third Circle of Hell
effect: When this card is deleted, you may immediately reveal the top 6 cards of your deck. If you do, delete all Areas on your side of the board. Then, choose an Area Spell from among the cards you revealed and immediately play it as an additional Action, if possible. Delete the remaining cards. You can only activate this effect once per turn.

name: The Warlord's Bite
effect: Choose a target and Poison it for the rest of the game. This Poison deals 30/60/120 damage per turn.

name: The Weather Orchestra
effect: This card's level in your hand is reduced by the combined number of all Singing Abilities attached to Heroes on the board. When you summon this Creature, you may choose up to 3 different Artifacts with a combined Cost of exactly 12 from your hand, deck or discard pile and equip them to Heroes on the board without paying their Costs. You may once per turn choose an Artifact equipped to a Hero and send it to the discard pile.

name: The White Army
effect: Choose up to half as many targets on the board as you control Creatures (rounded down) and Freeze them for 1 turn. If you control at least 2 level 0 Creatures, this counts as an additional Action. You can only activate 1 "The White Army" per turn.

name: The White Eye
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. Whenever the equipped Hero hits exactly 1 target with a Spell, you may have that target's controller discard 1 random card from their hand. When this card is sent to your discard pile, except because you discarded it from your hand, add it to your hand immediately.

name: The Yeeting
effect: Choose a Hero you control and deal 150 damage to it. Choose any card on the board that is not a Hero and send it to the discard pile. You can only play 1 "The Yeeting" per turn.

name: Thebinxan War Counsellor
effect:
You can only control 1 "Thebinxan War Counsellor".
You may once per turn make your opponent declare a card type (Attack/Spell, Artifact, Ability, Potion, Ascended Hero). Reveal the top card of your deck and add it to your hand. If it is not a card of the declared type, deal 50 damage to all targets your opponent controls.

name: Thep, the Court Scribe
effect: You may once per turn choose a defeated Hero that was defeated since the end of your last turn and revive with the same HP it had at the end of your last turn. You can only revive each Hero once with this effect.

name: Thicket
effect: Choose a Creature you control. That Creature cannot be chosen by cards and effects until the beginning of your next turn. A Creature cannot be affected by "Thicket" on 2 consecutive turns.

name: Thieving
effect:
1) You may once per turn steal 4 Gold from your opponent.
2) You may once per turn steal 8 Gold from your opponent.
3) You may once per turn steal 12 Gold from your opponent.

name: Thieving Strike
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to it. If a target your opponent controls takes damage from this Attack, you may choose a random card from your opponent's hand and add it to your hand. If the user has the Thieving Ability, this Attack's level becomes 0.

name: Thorad, Strength of Coolness
effect: Any damage this Hero deals to a single target with Attacks or Spells is increased by 40 times the number of cards in your Coolness Stack.

name: Thrysh, Robber of Coolness
effect: This card's level in your hand and on the board is reduced by the number of cards in your Coolness Stack. You may once per turn search your deck or Coolness Stack for an Artifact that can be played from the top of your Coolness Stack and immediately play it as if it was the top card of your Coolness Stack.

name: Thunder Trumpet
effect: When this Artifact equipped to a Hero you control is sent to the discard pile, choose a target and deal 80 damage it. You can only activate this effect of "Thunder Trumpet" once per turn.

name: Thunderstruck Waflav
effect: You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Waflav" Hero you control by removing 2 Evolution Counters from it. Ascending this Hero does not end your turn. Whenever this Hero defeats a target, place 1 Evolution Counter on it and choose any target on the board and Stun it for 1 turn. You may once per turn Descend this Hero to place 1 Evolution Counter onto it.

name: Time Bomblebee
effect: Once per turn, when a target your opponent controls is defeated, place a Bomb Counter onto this Creature. While this Creature has Bomb Counters on it, it cannot take damage or be defeated. At the start of your opponent's turn, remove all Bomb Counters from this Creature, and if you removed at least 1, choose a Creature and deal 150 damage to it.

name: Time Distortion
effect: Flip the top 3 cards of your deck face-up and choose a level 3 or lower Attack or Spell among them, if possible. The user of this Spell immediately performs that Attack or Spell as an additional Action, regardless of its level. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

name: Time Tyrant
effect: You may once per turn reveal the top card of your deck and then shuffle it back into your deck. If it was an Attack or Spell, draw cards equal to its level afterwards.

name: Timeless King Zi
effect: You may spend your Action to reveal 3 Spells with different names whose total levels do not exceed 6 from your deck. Your opponent chooses 1 of them. This Hero immediately performs that Spell, regardless of its level, if possible. Delete the other Spells.

name: Tobi, the Average Student
effect: You may reveal a Double Spell in your hand to summon this Creature as an additional Action. You may once per turn reveal a Double Spell from your hand and choose one of its Spell Schools. That Spell permanently loses that Spell School. You can only control 1 "Tobi, the Average Student".

name: Tool Freezer
effect:
Play this card immediately when your opponent plays an Artifact. Negate your opponent's Artifact. Your opponent does not have to pay the negated Artifact's costs. 
This Artifact's Cost becomes twice the negated Artifact's Cost.

name: Toras, Master of all Weapons
effect: This Hero's Attack stat is increased by 40 for each Artifact with a different name equipped to it. This Hero can never hit more than 1 target with an Attack.

name: Torchure
effect: Poison a Hero you control that is not Poisoned for the rest of the game. That Poison deals 60 damage per turn. You may perform a second Action during your Action Phase this turn. This counts as an additional Action.

name: Toughness
effect:
1) The Hero's current and max HP are increased by 100. This Ability cannot be negated.
2) The Hero's current and max HP are increased by 200. This Ability cannot be negated.
3) The Hero's current and max HP are increased by 400. This Ability cannot be negated.

name: Toxic Fumes
effect: Poison all Creatures on the board for the rest of the game. If a Creature is already Poisoned, its Poison's damage is increased by 30 instead. If you Poison at least 1 Creature you control with this effect, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Toxic Trap
effect: Activate this Surprise when the user is chosen by an opponent's Attack, Spell or Creature effect. Poison the attacker for the rest of the game. If it is already Poisoned, increase the Poison's damage by 30 instead.

name: Trade
effect:
1) You may once per turn delete the top 5 cards of your deck to gain 5 Gold.
2) You may once per turn delete the top 5 cards of your deck to gain 10 Gold.
3) You may once per turn delete the top 5 cards of your deck to gain 20 Gold.

name: Training
effect:
1) You may once per turn attach an additional Ability to this Hero.
2) You may once per turn attach up to 2 additional Abilities to this Hero OR discard a card and attach an Ability from your deck to this Hero.
3) You may once per turn attach up to 3 additional Abilities to this Hero OR attach an Ability from your deck to this Hero as an additional attachment.

name: Trample Sounds in the Forest
effect: Play this card immediately when you Ascend a Hero. You may immediately perform an additional Action with that Ascended Hero before your turn ends. You can only play 1 "Trample Sounds in the Forest" per turn.

name: Transdimensional Stab
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat it. Your opponent must discard 1 card from their hand for every 50 damage this Attack deals. If your opponent would have no cards in their hand after this Attack resolved, negate this Attack.

name: Transmission
effect: Choose any Artifact equipped to or Spell attached to any one Hero and equip/attach it to any other Hero. If you move the card to another Hero of the same player, this counts as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Transmission" per turn.

name: Trap Sabotage
effect: Choose a face-down Surprise your opponent controls and send it to the discard pile. Your opponent must send all copies of that Surprise from their hand and deck to their discard pile. If the user has at least Destruction Magic 1, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Trapping
effect:
1) You may once per turn choose a lv 1 or lower Surprise from your deck, reveal it and bring it directly into play in this Hero's Surprise Zone.
2) You may once per turn choose a lv 2 or lower Surprise from your deck, reveal it and bring it directly into play in this Hero's Surprise Zone.
3) You may once per turn choose a lv 3 or lower Surprise from your deck, reveal it and bring it directly into play in this Hero's Surprise Zone.

name: Traveler from the Future
effect: When you draw this card as part of your starting hand: You may immediately summon it as an additional Action. While you control this Creature: All cards you draw during your Resource Phase count as being part of your starting hand.

name: Treacherous Crystal
effect: When you draw or add this card to your hand, you must immediately reveal it. While this card is in your hand, your opponent may take control of all Creatures you control during their turns.

name: Treasure Chest
effect: Gain 10 Gold.

name: Treasure Hunter's Backpack
effect: Choose an equippable Artifact with a Cost of 50 or less from your deck and play it immediately without paying its Cost. The Hero you equip the Artifact to cannot perform an Action this turn.

name: Treasure Huntress Semi
effect: You gain 6 additional Gold during your Resource Phase.

name: Treasure Skeleton
effect: You may once per turn gain 6 Gold.

name: Treasure Theft
effect: Choose an Artifact equipped to a Hero your opponent controls and equip it to the user. If the user has no free Support Zones, this Spell has no effect. If the user has Decay Magic 1, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Tree of Golden Apples
effect: At the start of each turn, the turn player may choose any target their opponent controls and take control of it until the end of their turn. Targets controlled that way are unaffected by all other cards and effects.

name: Tri Ad, the Puppet Mistress
effect: This cannot be one of your Starting Heroes. You may once per turn place this card from your hand on top of a Hero you control whose original name is "Tri Fecta, the Puppet Master" OR move this Hero from on top of a Hero you control back to your hand. This Hero and Tokens in its Support Zones share 1 HP pool.  Cards cannot be placed into this Hero's Support Zones, except by the effect of "Puppet" Tokens. When this Hero has no Tokens in its Support Zones, it is immediately defeated. These effects cannot be negated.

name: Tri Fecta, the Puppet Master
effect: No cards can be placed into this Hero's Support Zones, except by its own effect or the effects of "Puppet" Tokens. At the start of the game, before drawing your starting hand, place 1 "Destructive Puppet Shishi", "Creative Puppet Brammi" and "Preserving Puppet Vinnie" Token into this Hero's Support Zones. This Hero and Tokens in its Support Zones share 1 HP pool. When this Hero has no Tokens in its Support Zones, it is immediately defeated. These effects cannot be negated.

name: Trial of Annoyance
effect: You cannot play other Attacks or Spells the turn you play this card. Your opponent discards cards from their hand until they only have 2 cards left. You can only play 1 "Trial of Annoyance" per game.

name: Trial of Coolness
effect: You cannot play other Attacks or Spells the turn you play this card. Choose a target you control, except the user. The next time that target is defeated, immediately revive it and fully heal its HP. You can only play 1 "Trial of Coolness" per game.

name: Trial of Dominance
effect: You cannot play other Attacks or Spells the turn you play this card. Defeat all Creatures your opponent controls. You can only play 1 "Trial of Dominance" per game.

name: Trial of Knowledge
effect: You cannot play other Attacks or Spells the turn you play this card. For the rest of the game, the levels of all "Trial of" Spells you play become 0 and cannot be increased by other effects. You can only play 1 "Trial of Knowledge" per game.

name: Trial of Loyalty
effect: You cannot play other Attacks or Spells the turn you play this card. Search your deck for up to 5 "Trial of" Attacks/Spells with different names, reveal them, and add them to your hand. You can only play 1 "Trial of Loyalty" per game.

name: Trident Spirit - Hammer Absorbed
effect: You can only summon this Creature by sacrificing a "Spirit of the Shattered Trident" and a "Spirit of the Relic Hammer" you control that were not summoned this turn. Summoning this Creature counts as an additional Action. You may once per turn Ascend a Hero you control to an Ascended Hero from your hand, ignoring its Ascension Condition. If you do, heal that Hero's HP completely and remove any negative status effects from it. You may Ascend a defeated Hero with this effect, and when you do, it is revived. You may activate this effect the turn this Creature is summoned. While you control this Creature, Ascending a Hero does not end your turn.

name: Triumphant Return
effect: Play this card immediately when a Hero you control, except the user, is revived. Immediately perform an additional Action with that Hero.

name: Troop Annihilation
effect: Play this card immediately when a Surprise Creature you control is defeated. Search your deck for a Surprise Creature with a different name, reveal it and add it to your hand.

name: True Fairy Crestina, the Primordial Goddess
effect:
You must play this Hero from your hand on top of a "Fairy Queen Crestina, the Creation Fairy" you control that has "Divine Awakening" attached to it. 
During your Resource Phase, you may skip drawing your card for turn and instead search any card from your deck and place it next to you face-up. 
While you control this Hero, you may play cards placed by this effect as if they were part of your hand. 
Once per turn, when an Ascended Hero you control would take damage, you may delete a card placed by this effect to negate that damage.

name: True Form
effect: Choose a Hero with a different name from all Heroes you control from your hand and place it on top of the user. The user becomes that Hero and its effects, Attack stat and max HP are replaced by that Hero's. You may at any time during your turn remove a Hero placed by this effect and send it to the discard pile to remove this effect. If this is the first Spell you use this turn, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Trunk Sand
effect: Choose a target and deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to it and Blind it until the next time it takes damage.

name: Truth-Seeing Eye
effect: The equipped Hero can choose any target with Attacks and Spells, negating all effects that would prevent those targets from being chosen, and the equipped Hero's Attacks and Spells cannot be redirected.

name: Tryse, the Shadow Slayer
effect: Up to 2 times per turn, when this Hero defeats a target your opponent controls, your opponent must discard 2 random cards from their hand.

name: Tsu'Ki, the Lunatic Princess
effect: This Hero can summon "Lunatic" Creatures regardless of their level. "Lunatic Cycle" cards that are equipped to this Hero have their Cost reduced by 10.

name: Tuscan Aristocrat
effect: While you control this Creature, your opponent cannot gain any Gold outside their Resource Phase.

name: Tuscan Artist
effect: While you control this Creature, any effect that would allow your opponent to draw 2 or 3 cards is negated.

name: Tuscan Mystic
effect:
While you control this Creature, your opponent cannot activate Potions. 
Whenever you would draw a card from your Potion Deck, you may reveal the top 2 cards of your Potion Deck and immediately resolve one of them instead. 
Delete both revealed cards afterwards.

name: Tuscan Prisoner
effect: While you control this Creature, you are unaffected by all effects that would end your turn.

name: Tushu, the Knowledge Keeper
effect:
You may once per turn activate 1 of the following effects:
- The next time you play a Normal Non-Creature Spell this turn, you may place it into this Hero's free Support Zone as a Scroll Token after it resolves. Scroll Tokens do not count as Creatures.
- You may delete a Scroll Token, and if you do, this Hero immediately uses that deleted Spell as if you had played it from your hand as an additional Action, if possible.

name: Ultimate Destroyer Punch
effect:
Choose a Creature your opponent controls and defeat it. Then, deal damage equal to that Creature's max HP to the corresponding Hero. 
This Attack's level is reduced by 1 for each of your defeated Heroes.

name: Ultimate Weapon Experiment
effect:
Search your deck for an Ascended Hero whose Ascension Conditions are fulfilled by a Hero you control and play it on top of that Hero. Then, heal that Ascended Hero's HP 
completely and remove all negative status effects from it.
This counts as an additional Action.

name: Uncool Malfunction
effect: Name an Ability. Your opponent cannot activate the active effect of Abilities with that name during their next turn.

name: Undead Guardian Angel
effect:
When this Creature is summoned by the effect of Necromancy, it gains the following effect:
The next time the corresponding Hero would be defeated while this Creature is in its Support Zone, heal its HP completely instead, and if you do, this Creature loses this 
effect. This effect is not negated by the effect of Necromancy.

name: Undurdle
effect: When this Creature is defeated, you may choose a level 1/2/3 or lower Creature from your discard pile, except "Undurdle", and place it into the Support Zone this Creature occupied.

name: Unguarded Gate
effect:
Play this card immediately when your opponent would negate one of your cards or effects or any damage one or more targets would take. 
Negate your opponent's negation effect.

name: Unholy Combination
effect: Sacrifice a Creature you control and discard a Potion in your hand to play this card. Choose a Creature up to 1 level higher, but with a different name from your deck and place it into the same Support Zone the sacrificed Creature occupied. That Creature may use its active effect this turn. This counts as an additional Action.

name: Unlikely Encounter
effect: Choose a Hero or Ascended Hero from your deck whose name is different from all Heroes you control, reveal it and add it to your hand. You cannot Ascend a Hero for the rest of the turn.

name: Unreasonable Anger
effect: Play this Spell immediately when a Hero that can use it is hit by an opponent's Attack, Spell or Creature effect. Until the end of your next turn, any damage the user deals to the attacker is doubled, and Attacks and Spells the user performs that would hit the attacker cannot be reacted to or negated in any way.

name: Unsettling Opportunist Vullary
effect: You may once per turn place a "Cute Princess Mary" from your hand or deck underneath this Creature. While this Creature has "Cute Princess Mary" attached to it, it gains 170 HP and this effect: You may once per turn summon a level 3 or lower Creature regardless of its level as an additional Action with the corresponding Hero, but negate its effects until the beginning of your next turn.

name: Unwanted Audience
effect: Play this card at the beginning of your opponent's turn. Creatures your opponent controls cannot activate their active effects this turn. This counts as a negative status effect.

name: Unwarranted Burst of Courage
effect: Choose a Creature you control and increase its level by up to 1/2/3 until the end of the turn. If you sacrifice that Creature, discard 1 card.

name: Ushabti of the Great Pharaoh
effect:
Choose any Creature on the board and place it face-down into the Surprise Zone of the corresponding Hero. 
A player may summon a Creature placed by this effect as an additional Action during their turn with the corresponding Hero. 
You cannot summon a Creature placed by this effect until the end of the turn.

name: Vacarn, the Dark Goblin Necromancer
effect: "Skeleton" Creatures this Hero summons with the effect of Necromancy don't have their effects negated and may use their active effects the turn they're summoned. Creatures in this Hero's Support Zones that are defeated are deleted.

name: Vampire on Fire
effect: Play this card immediately when your opponent would add 1 or more cards from their side of the board to their hand. Delete those cards instead, and if you do, draw 1 card.

name: Vampiric Sword
effect:
Equip this card to a Hero you control. The equipped Hero's Attack stat is increased by 10. 
Additionally, whenever the equipped Hero deals damage to a target with an Attack, it heals for half the amount (rounded up). 
You can only equip 1 "Vampiric Sword" to any Hero.

name: Vena, the Bounty Huntress
effect:
At the beginning of the game, before both players draw their starting hands, choose a Hero your opponent controls. You may once per turn spend 5 Gold to activate one of the following effects:
- Deal 100 damage to that Hero. If this damage defeats the target, choose a new Hero for this Hero's effects.
- Choose a card in that Hero's Support Zone and send it to the discard pile.
- Stun that Hero for 1 turn.

name: Vengeful Attack
effect: Choose a target that has defeated a target you control with an Attack, Spell or effect during your opponent's last turn. Deal damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to that target. This counts as an additional Action. You can only play 1 "Vengeful Attack" per turn.

name: Venom Infusion
effect: Choose a target and Poison it for the rest of the game. If the target is already Poisoned, increase the Poison's damage by 30 instead. If the user has Decay Magic 3, this Poison cannot be removed in any way and any effect that would replace it instead increases its damage by that much.

name: Very Special Prisoner
effect: Play this card immediately when you take control of an opponent's target. Attach a Divinity Ability from your hand or deck to a Hero you control. You cannot attach other Abilities to that Hero this turn.

name: Victorica, the Eternal Empress
effect: You may once per turn remove a Pollution Token from your side of the board that was not placed there this turn.

name: Victory Phoenix Cannon
effect: Choose a target and deal 200 damage to it. You may then immediately use a level 1 or lower Destruction Magic Spell from your hand with the user as an additional Action. If you do, the user takes 200 damage as recoil.

name: Vinepire
effect: The corresponding Hero is healed for all damage it deals to a single target your opponent controls with Attacks and Spells.

name: Visionary Genius Heinz
effect: You may once per turn discard up to 4 copies of the same card to draw that many cards.

name: Voice in your Head
effect: Only play this card while you control at least 1 Ascended Hero. Draw until you have 7 cards in your hand.

name: Von Pixmarck, the Iron Chancellor
effect: At the end of your turn, if both players control at least 1 Creature, both players choose 1 of their Creatures and change control of them, swapping their Support Zones.

name: Voodoo Curse
effect: Choose 2 targets that are controlled by the same player and swap their current and max HP, including all bonuses from Attachments, equipped Artifacts and Abilities. Then, if both targets have an Attack stat, swap those as well.

name: Waflav, the Metamorphing Monstrosity
effect:
Whenever this Hero defeats a target, place 1 Evolution Counter on it. You may remove 1 Evolution Counter from this Hero during your turn to activate one of the following effects, but each effect can only be activated once per turn:
- Draw 3 cards.
- Attach an additional Ability from your deck to this Hero.
- Attach up to 3 Abilities from your hand to this Hero as additional attachments.

name: Waitress
effect: You may heal a Hero you control from all status effects (at least 1) to summon this Creature as an additional Action. You may once per turn choose a target you control and heal it from any number of status effects.

name: Wall Breaker General Ralzish
effect: Once per turn, if there are exactly 2 Creatures in this Hero's Support Zones, you may choose any card on the board that is not a Hero and send it to the discard pile. You cannot choose a Creature that was summoned since the end of your last turn with this effect.

name: Wanted Poster
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. Whenever the Hero defeats a target, draw 2 cards. A Hero can only have 1 "Wanted Poster" equipped to it.

name: War Chest
effect: Gain 15 Gold for every "War Counsellor" Creature you control.

name: War Counsel Gathering Place
effect: Whenever a player summons a "War Counsellor" Creature, they may pay 8 Gold to immediately have it use its active effect.

name: Warhorse
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. When the equipped Hero hits exactly 1 target with an Attack, that Attack's damage is increased by 50.

name: Warrior of Teocuilatl
effect: You may sacrifice a Creature you control that was not summoned this turn to summon this Creature as an additional Action. Whenever a Creature either player controls would be affected by a card or effect, you may remove 1 Doom Counter from a "Doom Clock" to negate all effects that card or effect would have on that Creature.

name: Water Golem
effect: Activate this Surprise when a Surprise on your side of the board is sent to the discard pile by an effect. Summon this Creature into a free Support Zone of the user and choose a target your opponent controls. While this Creature remains on the board, that target's effects are negated.

name: Wavillion
effect: When the corresponding Hero defeats a target with an Attack, permanently increase its Attack stat by 100 afterwards.

name: Weakening Crystal
effect:
When you draw or add this card to your hand, you must immediately reveal it. 
While this card is in your hand, the effects of all your Heroes are negated. This counts as a negative status effect.

name: Wealth
effect:
1) Gain 4 additional Gold at the beginning of each of your turns.
2) Gain 8 additional Gold at the beginning of each of your turns.
3) Gain 12 additional Gold at the beginning of each of your turns.

name: Weapon Absorption
effect:
Choose any number of Artifacts equipped and Abilities attached to the user and send them to the discard pile. 
The user heals for 50 HP times the number of cards sent. This Spell's level is reduced by the number of Abilities you send with this effect.

name: Weapon Collecting Wight
effect: You may once per turn choose an equippable Artifact from your discard pile with a Cost of 15 or less and equip it to one of your Heroes without paying its Cost.

name: Weapon Storm
effect: Send any number of Artifacts equipped and Abilities attached to the user to the discard pile. Then, choose a target and deal damage equal to 40/50/60 times the number of cards sent to it.

name: Weapon Unleashing
effect: This Spell can only be used by a Hero with an Ability at level 3. Send all copies of a level 3 Ability from the user to the discard pile to use this Spell. You may perform a second Action with the user during your Action Phase this turn. This counts as an additional Action.

name: Weird Doll
effect: Choose an Ability attached to a Hero you control and send it to the discard pile. Delete this card.

name: Wendy, the Shy Girl
effect: You may immediately summon this Creature as an additional Action when you add a card from your side of the board to your hand. You may once per turn add this Creature you control back to your hand. If you do, the next Spell you use this turn has its level reduced by 3. You can only control 1 "Wendy, the Shy Girl".

name: Whale Race Boat
effect: A Hero can only have 1 "Race Boat" Artifact equipped to it. Once per turn, when the equipped Hero performs an Action, deal 40 damage to all other targets on the board. This damage is increased by 30 for every Creature in the equipped Hero's Support Zones

name: Wheels
effect: Draw 3 cards and discard 1 OR draw 4 cards and delete 2 cards from your hand. You can only play 1 "Wheels" per turn.

name: Whirlwind Strike
effect: Choose up to 2 Heroes your opponent controls. Inflict damage equal to the attacker's Attack stat to those Heroes and all Creatures in their Support Zones.

name: White Sacrificial Bull
effect: While this Creature remains on the board, it is also treated as a Hero (but has no Ability or Support Zones).

name: Wildur, the Shining Coolness
effect: When this Creature is the top card of your Coolness Stack, you may summon it as an additional Action from there during your turn. The first card that would be sent to your discard pile every turn while you control this Creature is placed on top of your Coolness Stack instead.

name: Willy, the Valiant Leprechaun
effect: At the end of your first turn, draw 5 cards or gain 30 Gold. You do not have a hand size limit until the start of your second turn.

name: Winged Haressassin
effect: Once per turn, when an opponent's card or effect chooses another target you control, you may discard a card to redirect it to this Creature. When this Creature is defeated by a card or effect redirected by this effect, deal 150 damage to any target.

name: Winged Skeleton
effect: Once per turn, when a "Skeleton" Creature you control is chosen by an opponent's card or effect, you may return that Creature back to your hand to negate the card or effect.

name: Wire Hatchling
effect: When you summon this Creature, choose any target on the board and deal damage to it equal to half its current HP (rounded up).

name: Wisdom
effect:
1) This Hero can use Spells 1 level higher than it normally could. If this Hero uses a Spell it would not be able to use without this effect, 
discard as many cards as the Spell's level is too high.
2) This Hero can use Spells 2 levels higher than it normally could. If this Hero uses a Spell it would not be able to use without this effect, 
discard as many cards as the Spell's level is too high.
3) This Hero can use Spells 3 levels higher than it normally could. If this Hero uses a Spell it would not be able to use without this effect, 
discard as many cards as the Spell's level is too high.

name: Wise Village Elder
effect: You may once per turn attach an additional Ability from your hand to the corresponding Hero. If that Hero has at least Summoning Magic 1, you may attach an Ability from your deck instead.

name: Wolflesia, the Canine Flower
effect: You may once per turn place a "Rafflesia, the Poison Princess" from your hand or deck underneath this Creature. While this Creature has "Rafflesia, the Poison Princess" attached to it, it gains 200 HP and this effect: You may once per turn use a level 3 or lower Decay or Support Spell with this Creature as an additional Action.

name: Wowhalla, the Hall of the Cool
effect: When this card comes into play, place the top card of your deck face-up in front of you. It becomes your Coolness Stack. At the end of each of your turns, place the top card of your deck face-up onto your Coolness Stack. When this card would be affected by an opponent's card or effect, you may delete the top card of your Coolness Stack to negate any effects that card or effect would have on this card. If this card is removed from the board, delete all cards in your Coolness Stack.

name: Wowkyrie, Bringer of Coolness
effect: You may once per turn place the top card of your deck on top of your Coolness Stack. While there are at least 3 cards in your Coolness Stack, all damage this Creature would take is negated.

name: Xal, the Animated Armor
effect: You may place Abilities into the Support Zones of this Hero. This Hero can have up to 6 different Abilities attached to it.

name: Xalibur
effect: Equip this card to a Hero you control. You can place Abilities from your hand into the equipped Hero's free Support Zones as if they were Ability Zones. If this card leaves the board, send all Abilities in the equipped Hero's Support Zones to the discard pile.

name: Yolomungandr, Ender of Coolness
effect: When you summon this Creature, delete all cards in your Coolness Stack and deal 30 damage times the number of cards deleted that way to all Heroes your opponent controls OR all Creatures your opponent controls. At the end of each of your turns, deal 30 damage times the number of cards in your Coolness Stack to all Heroes your opponent controls OR all Creatures your opponent controls.

name: You are the Chosen One!!!
effect: Choose a Hero you control. This Spell's level is reduced by 1 for every Ability attached to it. You may immediately perform an Attack or Spell from your hand with it as an additional Action. You cannot play other cards for the rest of the turn afterwards.

name: You! Help!
effect: Choose another Hero you control. The next time the user attacks this turn, its Attack stat is increased by the chosen Hero's base Attack stat.

name: YOU'RE ALIVE?!
effect: Choose a level 1/2/3 or lower Creature from your discard pile that was defeated before the beginning of your last turn and place it into one of the user's free Support Zones. If that was the only copy of that Creature in your discard pile, this counts as an additional Action.

name: Yukana, the Scholar on the Run
effect: As long as this Hero does not have a Spell School Ability attached to it, you may once per turn perform a level 1 or higher Spell with it as an additional Action.

name: Zamorin, the Spice Rajah
effect: Every "Secret Spice" Artifact you add to your deck during deck building counts as two copies of itself for its own effect.

name: Zira Racer
effect: You may once per turn discard a level 3 or lower Creature to choose a target and deal damage equal to 70 times the discarded card's level to it.

name: Zombiefied Assault
effect: Immediately play this card when one or more of your Creatures are defeated by your opponent's Spell or Attack. Choose one of those Creatures and revive it with full HP. This still counts as the Creature being defeated, but not as it being summoned again. After that, deal damage equal to 50 times the revived Creature's level to the attacking Hero.

name: Zsos'Ssar, the Serpent Warlord
effect:
When this Hero performs a Decay Spell, you must Poison a Hero you control or, if that Hero is already Poisoned, increase its Poison's damage by 60. 
Poison this Hero inflicts deals 60 damage. 
Any direct damage this Hero deals with Attacks and Spells against a single target is increased by 40 times the number of Poisoned targets on the board.

name: Zwei, the Lucky Thief
effect: You may once per turn choose an Ability from a Hero your opponent controls. Place it on top of an Ability of one of your Heroes. It is treated as a copy of that Ability. This counts as attaching an Ability to that Hero. At the end of your opponent's next turn, return the Ability to your opponent's Hero. If the opponent's Hero is defeated or its Ability is already at level 3, return it to your opponent's hand instead.
